en.ui_hockey_stick_tutorial_02: to attack monsters. You can also use it to cut grass.
en.ui_hockey_stick_desc: In the right hands, this can be a deadly weapon!
en.ui_hockey_stick_lv3_desc: The most powerful hockey stick known to man!
en.ui_item_defence_passive_item_desc: Blocks one hit, then recharges over time.
en.ui_item_defence_passive_item_tutorial_01: Legend has it that the scale blocks one hit, but must recharge afterward.
en.ui_item_magnet_desc: A magnet that magically attracts all kinds of useful items.
en.ui_bomb_desc: The Bombs blows things up. Hit them to push them!
en.ui_shovel_desc: It digs holes. Hold the button to make a ball.
en.ui_shovel_tutorial_desc: Use it to dig holes. Hold down the assigned button to create a ball.
en.ui_shovel_lv2_desc: It digs holes. Hold the button to make a ball.
en.ui_life_potion_desc: Tastes delicous, and on top of that it's refillable! Heals:
en.ui_life_potion_lv2_desc: The food tastes even better with a large ramen bowl!
en.ui_life_potion_lv3_desc: The greatest Gourmets use this Bowl to eat their Ramen!
en.ui_life_potion_lv4_desc: This legendary Ramen Bowl is unique in this universe!
en.ui_hungry_plant_desc: This plant can spit fire. It burns down all sort of things!
en.ui_hungry_plant_lv2_desc: This strange plant makes invisible floor tiles in Nia's light radius visible.
en.ui_food_sack_desc: Animals will react to these extra tasty treats!
en.ui_bird_desc: This energetic bird can carry many times its own weight.
en.ui_bird_tutorial_02: to send him out to fetch objects, or activate remote switches.
en.ui_trumpet_desc: In the right (or wrong) hands, it wakes the deepest slumber.
en.ui_alarm_clock_desc: Say goodbye to any unwelcome sleep attacks!
en.ui_game_dude_desc: The perfect device to kill some time!
en.ui_item_magic_staff_desc_popup: A staff infused with the energy of the ancient, extinct people known as the Maa-Es.
en.ui_dungeon_map_explanation: This handy map will show you the rooms of the dungeon. Just press
en.ui_dungeon_radar_explanation_01: With the Treasure Radar, you'll be able to see the locations of treasure chests on your map.
en.ui_dungeon_radar_explanation_02: An acoustic signal will tell you about secrets in a room. Keep your ears tuned!
en.ui_wood_plank_desc: Looks like good house building material!
en.ui_artifact_1_desc: You have received the Ancient Gear. It gives off an impression as if it were alive...
en.ui_artifact_2_desc: You have received the Swallowed Gear. It's a bit disgusting...
en.ui_artifact_3_desc: You have received the Trophy Gear. You feel a sense of pride when you hold it in your hand!
en.ui_artifact_4_desc: You have obtained the Icy Gear. It's REALLY damn cold, you should put it away quickly!
en.ui_hockey_book_01_circle_attack_desc: Three consecutive attacks executes the "hockey beam"!
en.ui_hockey_book_02_sprint_attack_desc: Attack while running for a sprint attack
en.ui_hockey_book_02_sprint_attack_tut_01: You have learned the Sprint Attack. Press
en.ui_hockey_book_02_sprint_attack_tut_02: while running with you Super Sneakers.
en.ui_hockey_book_02_sprint_attack_tut_01_l: You have learned the Super Sprint Attack. Press
en.ui_hockey_book_02_sprint_attack_tut_02_l: while running with you Super Sneakers.
en.ui_item_universal_translator_desc: This book magically translates any language.
en.ui_item_bamboo_goddes_part_desc: A fragment of the Bamboo Goddess.
en.ui_item_bamboo_goddes_put_together: You found all fragments of the Bamboo Goddess! AWESOME!
en.ui_item_antidote_butterfly_desc: This rare butterfly provides protection against poison.
en.ui_item_hot_water_bottle_desc: This keeps you so warm, you can withstand icy water!
en.ui_hot_chic_mag_desc: A magazine about chicken. It says "hot" on the cover...
en.ui_letter_01_desc: This letter is for someone in southern Barlu Forest.
en.ui_letter_02_desc: This letter's addressed to a boy that works in the nature.
en.ui_letter_03_desc: This letter's addressed to a guy who loves dogs.
en.ui_letter_04_desc: This letter's for a Ninja super fan...
en.ui_coconut_drink_desc: Super refreshing and quenches even the strongest thirst.
en.ui_item_flower_seeds_desc: A lovely addition to any home or garden.
en.ui_item_deepen_salt_desc: Unique salt that really showcases your cooking potential.
en.ui_item_cat_key_desc: You got this key from a cat...
en.ui_item_cook_contest_invitation_desc: Only the best chefs can participate in this Cook-Off!
en.ui_item_icebeak_key_desc: A cute key for an igloo in Igloo Heights
en.ui_item_milk_desc: Pour it on your cereal for the perfect start to the day.
en.ui_item_thermos_desc: You can use this to keep liquid warm.
en.ui_item_key_rex_desc: A Key and a... Dino in one. I'm not sure how that works...
en.ui_item_key_rex_hatched: A small Key-Rex has hatched from the egg, I wonder where it fits?
en.ui_item_key_rex_egg_item_received: An ancient ominous egg, what will hatch from it?
en.ui_item_gold_desc: Can be used to repair electronics.
en.ui_wallet_capacity_desc: You can carry Gold up to:
en.ui_ghettoblaster_desc: With the cassette recorder, you can now play found tapes in Nia's room! Enjoy!
en.ui_collection_golden_yarn_desc: I wonder what it's all about. Well, it looks valuable in any case. Maybe it could be traded in somewhere.
en.ui_chest_cannot_be_opened: but you don't have the right item to carry them.
en.npc_ancient_barlow_hint_01: One of the gear wheels is located in the [c_highlight_text]southeast[/c], on the surface.
en.npc_ancient_barlow_hint_02: Speak to the inhabitants of the island. Perhaps they will know more about it.
en.npc_adventures_warning_01: Hey kid! You'd better watch out, there's some pretty strong monsters further ahead.
en.npc_adventures_warning_02: Train a little more or prepare well, that's what I'd tell ya.
en.npc_adventures_warning_03: Here's a little insider tip: In Koala Village, you can have your items upgraded!
en.npc_adventures_warning_04: Just stop by the tent in the north of the village.
en.npc_adventures_village_01: Hey Nia, welcome to my place! Lemme see your map.
en.npc_adventures_village_02: Oh, I see you've already explored
en.npc_adventures_village_reward: For that, I'll give you a little reward. It's great to see people enjoying our home!
en.npc_adventures_village_come_back: Come back when you've explored more, okay?
en.npc_adventures_village_uncovered_all_01: Impressive! You've managed to uncover the whole Island... you must really love it here, right?
en.npc_arno_01: Hey, young lady... aren't you a bit too young to hang out in a dive like this?
en.npc_arno_02: Well, let's make an exception. Gambling on the machine is of course, strictly forbidden,
en.npc_arno_03: If I were you, in no case would I try to play with it!
en.npc_bamboo_guy_01: [shake] Sssss [/shake], I see that you possess a fragment of a Bamboo Goddess!
en.npc_bamboo_guy_02: Oh, what a truly fortunate coincidence, [shake] Sssss. [/shake]
en.npc_bamboo_guy_03: If you unite all three pieces, you can restore the Bamboo Goddess.
en.npc_bamboo_guy_04: [shake] Ssss [/shake] she'll keep you fit and vibrant!
en.npc_bamboo_guy_01_b: I rode the 'bam-bus' to get here... ah. Sorry for the dad-joke...
en.npc_bamboo_guy_when_bamboo_goddess_01: Ohhhh, you've restored the Bamboo Goddess! [shake] Ssss [/shake] ,that's amazing, my deepest gratitude to you!
en.npc_band_base_player_01: Sing us a song, you're the piano man. Sing us a song tonight...
en.npc_band_guitar_player_01: Hey, do you feel the groove?!
en.npc_band_drummer_01: Every note, every beat - that's our life!
en.npc_band_reward_01: Hey man, you've got rhythm in your blood. Here, take this as a little thank you!
en.npc_blizzard_01: The factory is located to the east from here. Good luck!
en.npc_bloomgold_01: What're you staring at? Don't you dare touch my gold, or I'll throw you out myself!
en.npc_bloomgold_b_01: I earned all this gold through hard work.
en.npc_bloomgold_b_02: If you want some too, grab a shovel and start digging!
en.npc_bloomgold_b_03: And now... get out of here, I need to count my gold.
en.npc_bloomgold_c_01: You're really a pain... You know what?
en.npc_bloomgold_c_02: The latest studies show that the more gold you have, the happier you are.
en.npc_bloomgold_c_03: I'm living proof of that. So go get your own gold!
en.npc_bloomgold_d_01: Oh man, fine, I'll give you some, but stop pestering me!
en.npc_bloomgold_after_gold_01: Get a job and leave me alone!
en.npc_bloomgold_awake: Hey! Were you trying to sneak in? Get out of here, right now!
en.npc_bloomgold_not_this_way_01: Going this way might... not... be such a good idea.
en.npc_bomb_betty_01_before_bomb: Hi... uh... is this the way to the farm?
en.npc_bomb_betty_02_before_bomb: Yes, this is the way to the farm.
en.npc_bomb_betty_03_before_bomb: There was a small landslide last night, how random! And inconvenient! And definitely not caused by me.
en.npc_bomb_betty_04_before_bomb: If you need to get to the farm, old Betty here might be able to help you. That's me, by the way.
en.npc_bomb_betty_05_before_bomb: Go [c_highlight_text]up the stairs[/c] here, and follow the path until you reach my house.
en.npc_bomb_betty_06_before_bomb: You'll find something quite punchy in there that'll deal with those rocks in no time.
en.npc_bomb_betty_07_before_bomb: Wow, that sounds... crazy. I'll head to your uhm, house then... cautiously.
en.npc_bomb_betty_08_before_bomb: Good attitude, dear. See you later! Best of luck on your way!
en.npc_bomb_betty_01_after_bomb: Ah, I see you've found my old bomb bag, hehe. You can keep it if you like.
en.npc_bomb_betty_02_after_bomb: Blow up anything that seems strange to you, like [c_highlight_text]these rocks here.[/c]
en.npc_bomb_betty_03_after_bomb: Sometimes, there's nice treasures to be found, even behind what are seemingly solid walls.
en.npc_bomb_betty_04_after_bomb: Thank you, Betty! Now, let's head to [c_highlight_text]the farm and find the gear![/c]
en.npc_bomb_betty_01: Thanks for your help the other day! I'm always up for a good blast.
en.npc_brina_walk_outside_01: Hey, are you new here? I'm Brina! Have you met my dad and his brother?
en.npc_brina_walk_outside_02: They're constantly bickering... I wish they could just stop and understand each other.
en.npc_brina_walk_outside_05: Hi Nia! Thanks again for helping me in the woods. My dad and his brother are talking more frequently now!
en.npc_brina_walk_outside_06: Gogh even joined us for a meal the other day.
en.npc_car_girl_desert_01: Where do these giant tendrils come from?
en.npc_car_girl_desert_02: I heard the way [c_highlight_text]south from Koala Village[/c] is another way to reach the farm...
en.npc_car_girl_desert_01b: Some days ago the bridge was clear...
en.npc_cat_god_normal_01: Hi, it's me, Nekogami, the Cat God, responsible for the well-being of animals and nature.
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_01: HEY! You! You've tortured animals for long enough now!
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_02: Didn't your parents teach you any manners!?
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_03: I am Nekogami, the god of cats. I watch over all the cats in this world.
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_04: What were you thinking when you attacked those helpless cats???
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_05: I'm going to tell you something, I keep an exact record of everyone's cat karma,
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_07: Yours is just... just, massively in the cellar. But, I figured you probably know that yourself.
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_08: I hope this lecture is a lesson for you, and that you'll appreciate all cats in the future.
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_09: Believe me, if you keep hitting cats, I'll be back and then you CERTAINLY won't have anything to laugh about!
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_10: And another thing... I was preparing a really delicious fish. When I get back home, it'll be cold.
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_12: Do you know how hard it is to get a really good fish?!
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_13: Also the right spices are indispensable! Do you have any idea just how much such quality spices cost?!?!
en.npc_cat_god_lecture_14: So now that's enough, but not goodbye.
en.npc_climber_cliff_01: Hey, I'm Cliff, and my life goal is to conquer the toughest mountains in the world!
en.npc_climber_cliff_02: Currently, I've got my sights set on Bran Bran Peak on Seashell Island.
en.npc_climber_cliff_03: But all of a sudden, two strange figures appeared further up, and they gave me a pretty uneasy feeling.
en.npc_climber_cliff_04: Now I'm stuck here, waiting for them to disappear.
en.npc_climber_cliff_05: After all, safety comes first, I always say!
en.npc_climber_cliff_igloo_heights_before_d: There were some pirates in this igloo, but I managed to drive them away.
en.npc_climber_cliff_igloo_heights_after_du: Now that I've climbed this mountain and the pirates here are peaceful again,
I plan to take a little vacation on the island before moving on.
en.npc_dimension_bear_intro_01: Manari, little person. My name is Ranar, and I am a world traveling merchant.
en.npc_dimension_bear_intro_02: I have traveled far to buy the most exquisite things for my homeland.
en.npc_dimension_bear_intro_03: If you bring me objects of interest, I can upgrade your items.
en.npc_dimension_bear_01: Do you have some new extraordinary items for me?
en.npc_dimension_bear_no_upgrade_items: Hmm... it looks like you don't have any items with you that I can upgrade at the moment.
en.npc_dog_lady_01: Oh hello, I hope Poppy didn't growl at you!
en.npc_dog_lady_02: He's sometimes a bit scared of strangers.
en.npc_dog_lady_with_letter_01: Are these the new [shake]DOG TREATS [/shake] I ordered!?
en.npc_dog_lady_after_letter_01: Thank you a lot delivering them! Now my little Poppy can feast again.
en.npc_drunk_guy_01: Hey w-who... are you!? I am umm.. Pratt *hicks*.
en.npc_drunk_guy_02: W.. Wanna hear the laaaaatest? S'posedly ol' Barlu *hick* out there... has been on a raaampage lately.
en.npc_drunk_guy_03: It's a GIANT earthworm that lives deep under the forest floor [c_highlight_text]in the Barlu Forest...[/c]
en.npc_drunk_guy_04: The... the B-Barlu Forest is in the... uhh.... west of the island *hick*
en.npc_drunk_guy_after_barlu_01: Hey *hick*, my grandfather once had a chicken coop at the edge of the village... *hick*...
en.npc_drunk_guy_after_barlu_02: northwest of Koala Village. It was a family business for generations... *hick*
en.npc_drunk_guy_after_barlu_03: But then, then it s-started to get strangely [shake] haunted [/shake] there, and we had to give up the coop...
en.npc_edamame_01: Hey hey hey! Everyone's welcome at my restaurant, whether you're human or monster!
en.npc_edamame_02: Conflict and commotion are prohibited here.
en.npc_edamame_03: Just relax, and enjoy the delicious refreshments I offer.
en.npc_edamame_04: Udon is my specialty, and you can get a bowl for just
en.npc_farmer_01: Oh... uh, hello! I don't have time right now,
en.npc_farmer_02: I'm figuring out how to get Greenhouse Rankenstein back in shape.
en.npc_farmer_03: No idea why, but it's a mess in there... full of thorn vines, weird stuff and monsters.
en.npc_farmer_04: There's lots of rowdy Tamanegi running amok. What on earth do they all want in there?
en.npc_farmer_05: Maybe something went wrong with the fertilizer...
en.npc_farmer_in_village_01: Hi Nia! I'm in the middle of delivering fruit drinks to Arno's Bar.
en.npc_farmer_after_d_01: No idea what happened here, but at least it's a bit quieter inside now.
en.npc_farmer_after_d_02: Even the spikey vines on the bridge are gone.
en.npc_farmer_after_d_03: Phew, next time I'll stick to the regular fertilizer, not this fancy stuff!
en.npc_farmer_daughter_01: Good morning! Unfortunately I can't offer you anything at the moment... we're waiting for new goods,
en.npc_farmer_daughter_02: but the bridge our delivery comes by is blocked by spikey vines.
en.npc_farmer_daughter_03: Just between you and me, I think it's got something to do with the chaos [c_highlight_text]in Greenhouse Rankenstein.[/c]
en.npc_farmer_daughter_04: Thanks for the help over in the greenhouse! Now, our deliveries and new goods are coming in again.
en.npc_farmer_kid_01_b: You should definitely visit Koala Village.
en.npc_farmer_kid_02_b: There's a strange guy living in a tent who can enchant ramen bowls
en.npc_farmer_kid_03_b: to carry even more of this delicious ramen. And more ramen is what I've always wanted!
en.npc_farmer_wife_before_d1_01: Normally, we deliver our products all over the island, even to places like the frosty Igloo Heights!
en.npc_farmer_wife_before_d1_02: Unfortunately, the bridge's blocked right now, and we can't make deliveries.
en.npc_farmer_wife_after_d1_01: The bridge is open again, and we can finally get through to deliver our goods to people.
en.npc_farmer_wife_after_d1_01_b: I think Poncho has set up a secret room somewhere in the attic of our barn...
en.npc_farmer_wife_hint_to_graveyard_ghost_: Just recently, in the middle of the night at the cemetery here, I saw something weird…
but I bet you wouldn't believe me anyway.
en.npc_flower_girl_01: Please excuse the mess here! All my plants are infested with these pesky fire beetles...
en.npc_flower_girl_02: They devour everything they can find. It's a plague!
en.npc_flower_girl_03: Once I've taken care of them, I'll be able to finally offer flower seeds for sale again.
en.npc_flower_girl_01_b: I wonder if Farmer Pete still has some [s_inline_plant_pest_killer]  left in his store.
en.npc_flower_girl_pest_anhilator_01: Am I seeing this correctly!? Do you have the organic [s_inline_plant_pest_killer]  ?
en.npc_flower_girl_pest_anhilator_02: That would be perfect, since it only repels the fire beetles without killing them!
en.npc_flower_girl_reward_text_02: Here, take this as a reward.
en.npc_flower_girl_after_pest_anhilator_01: Hello, Nia! Did you know that Seashell Island has its own newspaper?
en.npc_flower_girl_after_pest_anhilator_02: It's like a colorful bouquet of news,
en.npc_flower_girl_after_pest_anhilator_03: with every issue blooming with fresh stories!
en.npc_flower_girl_after_pest_anhilator_04: You should check it regularly to stay up to date and find out what's going on here!
en.npc_fleamarket_kid_01: Hey, lady! I'm selling all my old stuff here. Take your time and have a look around!
en.npc_fleamarket_kid_sould_out_01: Sorry, lady, but everything's sold out.
en.npc_fisher_hint_01: There's not only small, but also large rare fish. So, it's not always about the size!
en.npc_fisher_hint_02: In different places, you'll be able to catch different fish.
en.npc_fisher_hint_03: There's this old geezer wandering around somewhere on the island. He's an expert on Hiku birds.
en.npc_fisher_hint_03_2: I saw him near the entrance to Barlu Forest the other day.
en.npc_frog_02: But sometimes, I get stuck when I search for them, especially in old tree trunks.
en.npc_frog_03: It feels like these tasty acorns pull me into little adventures,
en.npc_frog_04: where I could use a bit of help now and then. But that doesn't stop me from continuing
en.npc_frog_05: to search for my beloved acorns and enjoying the small adventures along the way, ribbit!
en.npc_frog_01_b: Yeah, and sometimes I maybe eat a few too many acorns and have to spit some out...
en.npc_frog_02_b: It helps, especially when trying to get out of the tree trunk, ribbit.
en.npc_gogh_01: Ah, a new face! Welcome to my world of colors.
en.npc_gogh_02: You radiate a curious energy, like a blank canvas
en.npc_gogh_03: ready to be filled with the brushstrokes of life.
en.npc_gogh_04: Let yourself be swept away by the flow of creativity, my friend.
en.npc_gogh_01_after_quest: Thank you for restoring peace between my brother and me.
en.npc_gogh_02_after_quest: Since then, I've been bursting with new inspiration.
en.npc_gogh_03_after_quest: May our adventure continue to be shaped by creativity and harmony.
en.npc_gogh_01_after_quest_b: The other day, I even went out to eat with Lucca! We had a great time.
en.npc_gourmet_before_contest_01: If you want to participate in the cook-off, you [c_highlight_text]need an Invitation[/c]  [s_inline_invitation].
en.npc_gourmet_before_contest_02: However, we've already ran out of those. Only one, [c_highlight_text]Master Pankeki[/c], has not yet accepted.
en.npc_gourmet_before_contest_03: He lives [c_highlight_text]southwest[/c] of here, quite nearby.
en.npc_gourmet_before_contest_01_b: I wonder why Master Pankeki hasn't answered yet?
en.npc_gourmet_with_invitation_01: Oh, you have an [c_highlight_text]Invitation[/c] [s_inline_invitation]! And it's the one from Master Pankeki!
en.npc_gourmet_with_invitation_02: Surprised would be putting it mildly, I'm actually shocked!
en.npc_gourmet_with_invitation_03: However, if Master Pankeki decided to give his invitation away to someone,
en.npc_gourmet_with_invitation_04: he must be sure that this person is truly worthy.
en.npc_gourmet_with_invitation_05: I trust you will put on a good show.
en.npc_gourmet_with_invitation_06: Take the [c_highlight_text]right staircase[/c] and you'll get to Cook Arena! Good luck!
en.npc_gourmet_after_the_show_01: That was a great performance! The dish has somehow... tasted like adventure!
en.npc_gourmet_after_the_show_02: Feel free to come back if you want to set more records.
en.npc_gourmet_after_the_show_03: Of course, there are other prizes as well.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_01_before_puzzle: If you manage to solve all of our puzzles, you'll get the key to the chicken coop! Cluck.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_01_after_puzzle: Wow! I'm really impressed that you managed to solve all our puzzles.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_mid_01: Cluck! Oh, you're not half bad for a human.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_mid_02: By the way, the lower floors of the well are kind of... strange.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_mid_03: I have no idea who built them, but it surely wasn't the island's residents. Cluck, Cluck.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_remus_friend_01: Cluck! The puzzle on this floor wasn't crafted by us chickens,
en.npc_ghost_chicken_remus_friend_02: it was devised by a boy from the village.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_remus_friend_03: He's the only one who sometimes visits us, and isn't afraid of us.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_4_01: Cluck! Well, are you wondering what's hiding in our chicken coop?
en.npc_ghost_chicken_teleporter_01: Cluck! Hey, not bad! You've made it this far!
en.npc_ghost_chicken_teleporter_02: Do you want to go back to the surface, Cluck?
en.npc_ghost_chicken_phil_01: Hi, I'm Phil! Nice to meet you Cluck Cluck.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_phil_01_b: Now that we know each other, what's your favorite food, Cluck ?
en.npc_ghost_chicken_coop_A_01: The fact that you've found this chicken coop isn't a coincidence! Everything is predetermined, Cluck.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_coop_A_02: Cluck Cluck! Let's take an example from physics.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_coop_A_03: Say, you want to calculate if a nail can support a picture frame.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_coop_A_04: You consider variables like the nail's strength, the wall's material, and the force exerted by the picture.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_coop_A_05: These variables are measurable and predictable.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_coop_A_06: Cluck, Now, imagine the universe is like a vast closed space,
en.npc_ghost_chicken_coop_A_07: governed by the same laws, Cluck Cluck.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_coop_A_08: That means there's no free will or individual decisions, everything is already set.
en.npc_ghost_chicken_coop_A_09: Good luck on your journey, because whatever happens, it was always meant to be, Cluck!
en.npc_graveyard_ghost_after_you_got_rekord: Hey Nia, so how's it going with that old, uh ...
what was it called again ... ah yes, cassette recorder?
en.npc_helen_01: Ah... my husband Lucca and his brother Gogh got along well for most of their lives,
en.npc_helen_02: but that changed in recent years.
en.npc_helen_03: Lucca was always extremely diligent and worked hard,
en.npc_helen_04: while Gogh received more attention from their parents.
en.npc_helen_05: Gogh has always lived carefree, showing little interest in things other than his art.
en.npc_helen_06: In recent years, I can tell that's led to tensions between the brothers.
en.npc_helen_01_after_quest: Thank you for saving Brina. Finally, Gogh and Lucca are getting along again.
en.npc_hiku_master_intro_01: Ah, I see you have a Hiku bird with you as well. Aren't they simply wonderful?
en.npc_hiku_master_intro_02: These majestic creatures have accompanied me all my life.
en.npc_hiku_master_intro_03: Tell me, have you ever tried catching a fish with your Hiku bird?
en.npc_hiku_master_intro_04: This pond is just the perfect place for it. Just aim for the dark spots in the water!
en.npc_hiku_master_normal_01: Because I always enjoy supporting junior Hiku trainers, I have a special offer for you.
en.npc_hiku_master_normal_02: If you manage to bring me every type of fish on this island,
en.npc_hiku_master_normal_03: I will reward you with something special.
en.npc_hiku_master_normal_04: Just come back to me once you've completed the task.
en.npc_hiku_master_you_have_all_fish_01: Do I see all the fish around the island in your inventory!?
en.npc_hiku_master_you_have_all_fish_02: Astonishing, marvelous, wonderful! You actually did it!
en.npc_hiku_master_you_have_all_fish_03: No idea what it's good for, but it feels very precious.
en.npc_hiku_master_after_quest_01: By the feathers of the great Hiku, you truly have the potential to become a great master one day!
en.npc_hiku_master_after_quest_02: I suppose I'll have to work hard myself to make sure you don't surpass me.
en.npc_hiku_master_yes_no_dialog_01: Would you like to trade one of each type of fish for a surprise?
en.npc_hoody_before_dungeon_4_01: Hey man, someone tipped me off that the Icebeaks are in a sticky situation up on [c_highlight_text]Bran Bran Peak[/c]!
en.npc_hoody_before_dungeon_4_03: Maybe the woman at the lift [c_highlight_text]northwest of here[/c] knows more.
en.npc_hoody_before_final_01: Hey, did you hear!? There was a little earthquake this morning in the village...
en.npc_igloo_heights_inn_receptionist_01: Please come to the front of the counter.
en.npc_igloo_heigths_bar_visitor_01_01: Oh, phew, you're not a pirate, what luck.
en.npc_igloo_heigths_bar_visitor_01_02: Hey, since you're not a pirate, I'll tell you a secret.
en.npc_igloo_heigths_bar_visitor_01_03: The store owner will open the door for you if you [c_highlight_text]knock four times.[/c]
en.npc_igloo_heigths_bar_visitor_01_after_d: I read in a magazine the other day that you can bury bombs with a shovel.
Apparently, this is a good way to make a trap for monsters.
I wonder if there's monsters that are so much easier to defeat this way...
en.npc_igloo_heights_shop_keeper_standart_t: Hello, please take your time to browse around. You can take all the time in the world here to explore!
en.npc_igloo_heights_shop_keeper_when_on_mi: If you had some [c_highlight_text]hot water[/c], I could thaw [c_highlight_text]the milk[/c] for you.
en.npc_igloo_heights_shop_keeper_when_you_h: With that, I can quickly thaw out the milk and make it a liquid again in no time.
Now you can go and buy milk again, and I'll even give you a special price.
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowy_no_shovel_01: Hey! Just take my shovel, it's over there!
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowy_with_shovel_01: You can use the shovel to dig holes, but for this challenge, let's try something different.
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowy_with_shovel_02: Just hold down the shovel button and move around to gather snow and make snowballs.
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowy_with_shovel_03: You can use these balls to fill up all kinds of holes. just make sure they have the [c_highlight_text]right size.[/c]
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowy_holes_fixed_01: Remember, [c_highlight_text]Glaciers home is in the north west [/c] of igloo heights.
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowy_fater_d4_01: Hey Nia, what's up? Have you ever tried to beat my record at snowboarding?
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowy_fater_d4_02: At the lift station, you can rent a board and hit the slopes!
en.npc_igloo_heights_glacier_before_thermos: If you're after the thermos flask, here's what you need to do:
Find the snowman with the stick in its head,
track its gaze until you reach a rocky wall, and start digging there.
en.npc_igloo_heights_glacier_after_d4_01: There are many of us Icebeaks all over the Island. Have you found any yet?
en.npc_igloo_heights_icestorm_02_intro: The others got cold feet and are hiding, but I couldn't care less.
en.npc_igloo_heights_icestorm_03_intro: Hey you, fancy a round of boarding?
en.npc_igloo_heights_icestorm_04_intro: If you make it down all the way, I'll fix your lift.
en.npc_igloo_heights_icestorm_05_intro: Just talk to me when you're ready for the plunge... I mean, the descent!
en.npc_igloo_heights_icestorm_01: Up for a downhill ride with the board?
en.npc_igloo_heights_aurora_before_d4_01: Are you a P-P-P-Pirate? You don't look like a pirate at all!
en.npc_igloo_heights_aurora_before_d4_02: The only one brave enough not to hide is Icestorm.
en.npc_igloo_heights_aurora_before_d4_03: He's standing around down at the store. Maybe you could talk to him.
en.npc_igloo_heights_aurora_after_d4_01: I still can't get used to the fact that the pirates are now helping us with our work.
en.npc_igloo_heights_mayor_01: The Pirates... oh, they really don't want to be called that anymore,
en.npc_igloo_heights_mayor_02: I mean, ahem, of course the maritime freedom enthusiasts are now assisting us with deliveries,
en.npc_igloo_heights_mayor_03: allowing us to focus more on cereal production!
en.npc_igloo_heights_mayor_after_dungeon_01: Did you know that all of our delicious ingredients come directly from Seashell Island?
en.npc_igloo_heights_mayor_after_dungeon_02: Alberto, the farmer, practically showers us with his finest goods!
en.npc_igloo_heights_mayor_after_dungeon_03: We even extract some treasures ourselves. The island is truly a treasure trove of resources.
en.npc_igloo_heights_mayor_after_dungeon_04: There are unique plants here that you won't find anywhere else.
en.npc_igloo_heights_mayor_after_dungeon_05: This allows us to maximize our revenue without relying on bothersome imports.
en.npc_igloo_heights_mayor_after_dungeon_06: A clever move, wouldn't you agree?
en.npc_igloo_heights_worker_01_01: We need to get some more pallets from storage, this one here's ready to be shipped.
en.npc_igloo_heights_worker_01_02: Alright, we'll get this one in the afternoon.
en.npc_igloo_heights_pirate_worker_02_01: We be workin' for the Pengu... beg your pardon, I mean the Icebeaks now!
en.npc_igloo_heights_pirate_worker_02_02: Tis a fine change, and we be haulin' in all the Flakes we fancy.
en.npc_igloo_heights_avalanche_01: Hollero! Isn't that what you humans say?
en.npc_igloo_heights_avalanche_02: Well, never mind. Thanks again for the delicious Schmackofatz!
en.npc_igloo_heights_avalanche_01_b: Um, did you know that somewhere on the island, Nekogami, the Cat God resides?
en.npc_igloo_heights_avalanche_02_b: I wonder what he tastes like...
en.npc_igloo_heights_avalanche_gives_you_re: Nom Nom... wow, that was delicious! Thank you for the fruits.
I just wanted to take a nap here, and then suddenly you stuff fruit into me...
Here, you can have this as a reward!
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowflake_01: The pirates are trying to be really nice now! Finally, I can go ice skating again!
en.npc_igloo_height_fisher_01: So, why do we even go fishing?
en.npc_igloo_height_fisher_02: Well, to be honest, we hardly eat fish ourselves. But you know what?
en.npc_igloo_height_fisher_03: We turn it into the tastiest breakfast cereal!
en.npc_igloo_height_fisher_04: Give our 'Fishy Loops' a try. They're truly awesome! You can't get that unique taste anywhere else!
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowball_01: My grandfather entrusted me with a secret,
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowball_02: but I can't pass it on, otherwise it wouldn't be a secret anymore.
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowball_01_b: Oh well, alright, alright, I'll tell you anyway.
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowball_02_b: He was a famous coconut golf player and always said
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowball_03_b: that the best records are achieved with the explosive swing of a bomb...
en.npc_igloo_heights_snowball_04_b: I have no idea what that means. But somehow, it sounds exciting, doesn't it?
en.npc_igloo_heights_frozen_01: Wow, you must be the girl who defeated the pirates?
en.npc_igloo_heights_frozen_03: Take this as a thank you!
en.npc_igloo_heights_frozen_01_b: Say, uhm... where do you get such cool clothes!? They're really awesome! I wish I could be as cool!
en.npc_inua_musuem_01: How's your achievements coming along? Have you accomplished all of them yet?
en.npc_inua_musuem_02: Take your time, and be sure to enjoy life and your adventures.
en.npc_jessy_beach_woman_01: I really love gardening, but man, it can wipe me out.
en.npc_jessy_beach_woman_02: A proper [c_highlight_text] refreshment [/c] would be great now.
en.npc_jessy_beach_woman_thanks_01: Big thanks for this awesome breather, now I can jump back into it with a fresh vibe, thanks!
en.npc_jessy_beach_woman_thanks_02: Oh, by the way, I found this weird old alarm clock up in the attic.
en.npc_jessy_beach_woman_thanks_03: Maybe you can do something cool with it?
en.npc_jessy_beach_woman_after_quest_02: At the beach the other day, I saw a Tamanegi burying something between the middle of two palm trees.
en.npc_jessy_beach_woman_after_quest_03: But I didn't dare to look what it was!
en.npc_jessy_beach_woman_after_quest_04: Did you know that some of these onion guys are actually quite nice?
en.npc_librarian_01: Oh hello, if you're new here feel free to take a look, we have lots of interesting books!
en.npc_librarian_01b: We even have some Tips & Tricks for battling monsters... but I don't know why one would like to do that.
en.npc_lover_girl_before_letter_01: I wonder if I'll meet him again today at the farm....
en.npc_lover_girl_before_letter_02: [shake]OH! [/shake] Uh, hello! I didn't hear you come in.
en.npc_lover_girl_before_letter_03: I was just talking to myself. I'm Yua by the way, nice to meet you.
en.npc_lover_girl_during_letter_01: You're the one delivering my letter? It's for Kaito, he's the farmers son.
en.npc_lover_girl_after_letter_01: Thank you Nia, I never dared to talk to Kaito before
en.npc_lover_girl_after_letter_02: but thanks to the letter I could finally tell him my feelings!
en.npc_Lucca_001: Oh, Hi! Are you new here in Koala Village? I'm Lucca, the engineer.
en.npc_Lucca_002: Currently, I'm performing maintenance on the fisherman's engine.
en.npc_Lucca_003: He can't set sail this time of year anyway.
en.npc_Lucca_004: It drives me nuts that my brother Gogh always leaves his stuff lying around here!
en.npc_Lucca_when_entering_door_01: There's no one at home at the moment.
en.npc_Lucca_008_in_quest_forest: The forest can be quite dangerous at this time of year. I need to find her as quickly as possible!
en.npc_Lucca_008_after_quest: I'm truly grateful that you and Gogh helped my Brina.
en.npc_Lucca_009_after_quest_b: Sometimes, strange noises come from the attic.
en.npc_Lucca_010_after_quest_b: No idea what it is, the only entrance is on Gogh's side.
en.npc_lumberjack_boss_01: ...and this one needs to go too.
en.npc_lumberjack_boss_02: That wretched Big Barlu... it's just too dangerous to fall in the north.
en.npc_lumberjack_boss_03_b: Better not head north for now, the Big Barlu's been raging there lately!
en.npc_lumberjack_boss_04_b: He likes the dry soil, But guess what the trees hate? Exactly that!
en.npc_lumberjack_boss_05_b: If he were gone, we could reforest the forest.
en.npc_lumberjack_boss_06: The Big Barlu's gone, and the forest is recovering. It's so nice to see if full of life again.
en.npc_lumberjack_1_01: Hey, better not go north, it's super dangerous there. Only the well prepared should try!
en.npc_lumberjack_1_02: Last week Lui just wanted to collect some branches for the fire...
en.npc_lumberjack_1_03: It could have cost him his life. The Big Barlu's hanging around there.
en.npc_lumberjack_1_04: It's a giant worm burrowing through the earth... urgh.
en.npc_lumberjack_1_05_b: Fortunately, the Big Barlu's simply remained in its territory.... so far...
en.npc_lumberjack_1_06: The boss wants us to reforest the forest to the north when we're done here.
en.npc_lumberjack_1_07: Fortunately, the Big Barlu is finally gone. Now we can get back to it!
en.npc_lumberjack_2_01: Oh man, I found such a strange booklet in the forest.
en.npc_lumberjack_2_02: At first I thought it was... well, adult entertainment...
en.npc_lumberjack_2_03: However, it turned out to be something else very [shake]bizarre.... [/shake]
en.npc_lumberjack_2_04: Hopefully the Boss won't find it, I hid it in my old sticky drawer.
en.npc_lumberjack_2_05_b: Fortunately, the Boss doesn't know that the drawer always needs a hit.
en.npc_lumberjack_old_boss_01: Hey there, listen up! This ain't no playground for youngsters, it's a proper sawmill.
en.npc_lumberjack_old_boss_02: If my boys catches wind of you here, they'll show you the exit.
en.npc_lumberjack_old_boss_03: You'd do well to find another place to hang around!
en.npc_lumberjack_old_boss_trumpet_hint_01: Recently, there's been a darn loud noise coming [c_highlight_text]from the beach.[/c]
en.npc_lumberjack_old_boss_trumpet_hint_02: It woke me up from my nap, for Barlu's sake!
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_a_01: My dad paid for me to come here for the tourney.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_a_02: What a waste of time, I'd much rather hang out on the yacht.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_a_03: That was really an incredible show!
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_a_04: Maybe I should try cooking instead of just indulging in luxury.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_b_01: The food here is known among gourmets around the world.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_c_01: The owner of this restaurant is really a crazy gourmet.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_c_02: I think food is more important to him than his grandmother.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_d_01: My husband is crazy about these croisants.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_d_02: Oh you are the winner of the cooking tournament, can you give me an autograph?
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_f_01: The great art of winning gold in the cooking duel is to prepare several things at the same time.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_f_02: If one part of the dish is cooking or baking, start with the next part.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_g_01: The tournament is mainly about speed.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_g_02: Most chefs are so good that the quality of the dishes is actually always the same.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_h_01: Hey... you know, I read somewhere that the key to perfect cooking is multitasking.
en.npc_lighthouse_generic_npc_h_02: While one thing is simmering, you're already whipping up the next masterpiece.
en.npc_lighthouse_maiden_reception_01: Welcome to Mr Presunto's forum of the culinary arts.
en.npc_lighthouse_maiden_reception_02: If you want to participate in Mr. Presuntos Grand Cook-Off, you need an invitation.
en.npc_lighthouse_maiden_reception_03: If you have an invitation, please use the stairs to your right.
en.npc_lighthouse_maiden_reception_lelft_01: Hello there! We offer only the finest drinks and most exquisite snacks,
en.npc_lighthouse_maiden_reception_lelft_02: from the refreshing Koala Cooler and the icy Bran Bran Blizzard to the creamy Iglu Milk
en.npc_lighthouse_maiden_reception_lelft_03: and the legendary Barlu-Gurgler. And of course, we also have water!
en.npc_lighthouse_maid_e2_01: Somehow you can feel a draft here, I wonder where it comes from.
en.npc_makinori_bensei_A_01: Hmm, I wonder what Dorimi will cook up today.
en.npc_makinori_bensei_A_02: Probably just instant noodles again, thanks to [c_highlight_text]the blocked road to the farm... [/c]
en.npc_makinori_bensei_A_03: Oh, hello! Sorry, I tend to have conversations with myself.
en.npc_makinori_bensei_B_01: My wife is quite the looker, isn't she?
en.npc_makinori_bensei_B_02: No idea how I managed to convince her to marry me.
en.npc_makinori_bensei_B_03: Oh, by the way, she's the teacher here in the village.
en.npc_makinori_bensei_C_01: Man, the food [c_highlight_text] at the cooking contest [/c] always looks so delicious!
en.npc_makinori_bensei_C_02: That event attracts the weirdest folks, but the food, oh, the food!
en.npc_makinori_bensei_D_01: Listen, I've heard there's [c_highlight_text] a thief [/c]roaming around, stealing food.
en.npc_makinori_bensei_D_02: So far, he hasn't come our way. Maybe he just doesn't have a taste for instant noodles.
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_A_01: People are whispering about a [c_highlight_text] night thief[/c] in the village, who comes and goes like a shadow.
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_A_02: It seems that his main target is... food.
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_B_01: Although Koala Village may be small, there's so much to discover!
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_B_02: Did you know that the store regularly updates its inventory?
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_B_03: Drop by more often, and you might stumble upon something new.
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_C_01: My husband Bensei and I planned to visit [c_highlight_text] Igloo Heights on the mountain [/c] for our next vacation.
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_C_02: He insists on bathing naked in the hot springs.
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_C_03: But somehow, the lift to Igloo Heights is out of service. I wonder what's going on there.
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_D_01: I may not be a master chef, but I look forward to the [c_highlight_text] big cooking contest at the lighthouse [/c] every year.
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_D_02: Sometimes, the direct route's blocked unfortunately, and you have to go through [c_highlight_text] the desert in the east.[/c]
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_D_03: It's really a challenge and you should be well prepared for the journey.
en.npc_makinor_dorimi_E_01: Come back later, I'm still busy at the moment. -Dorimi Makinori
en.npc_master_pankeki_before_quest_01: Surely you're exhausted after getting here, the wetlands can be very dangerous.
en.npc_master_pankeki_before_quest_02: Try some of my stew, it'll do you good.
en.npc_master_pankeki_before_salt_01: The Deep Salt can be found in [c_highlight_text]the Old Mine on the way to the farm.[/c]
en.npc_master_pankeki_before_salt_02: Show me your potential, and you can become my students.
en.npc_master_pankeki_before_the_cook_off_0: It's been years since I last competed in the Grand Cook-Off,
you better hurry up and go to [c_highlight_text]the lighthouse[/c] or they'll start without you!
en.npc_master_pankeki_after_the_cook_off_01: I'm very happy that you won Mr. Prestunto's Grand Cook-Off.
en.npc_master_pankeki_after_the_cook_off_02: Enjoy your success, but don't let it go to your head.
en.npc_master_pankeki_after_the_cook_off_03: Humility is the secret of knowledge.
en.npc_master_pankeki_after_the_cook_off_04: People who think they are the best are no longer able to learn anything new.
en.npc_master_pankeki_after_the_cook_off_05: This is the true secret of any art.
en.npc_mayor_01: Hello, you must be Nia? I'm the Mayor of this Town.
en.npc_mayor_02: If there are any issues regarding Koala Village, then don't hesitate to come to me.
en.npc_mayor_hint_dungeon_4_01: Hey, when I tried to call my buddies in [c_highlight_text] Igloo Heights [/c], unfortunately, nobody picked up...
en.npc_mayor_hint_dungeon_4_02: Now I'll have to forget about my morning Apple Leeks.
en.npc_mayor_hint_dungeon_4_03: Without the lift, there's nothing here!
en.npc_mayor_hint_dungeon_4_04: By the way, did you know that the Icebeaks are famous for their darn delicious cereals?
en.npc_mayor_after_dungeon_regular_text_01: Previously, my office was in the town hall, but honestly, there wasn't much to do.
en.npc_mayor_after_dungeon_regular_text_02: So, I made room for the reporter. He needs his stories, you know?
en.npc_mayor_after_dungeon_regular_text_03: In such a small village, there's not much for a mayor to do. Can you imagine how boring that is?
en.npc_mayor_after_dungeon_regular_text_04: But hey, at least it's pretty cozy around here.
en.npc_molevich_dungeon1_01: Hey! Have you heard the latest rumors? On [c_highlight_text]the farm in the southeast[/c], the farmer
en.npc_molevich_dungeon1_02: apparently has a problem with Greenhouse Rankenstein. Maybe it's worth a visit.
en.npc_molevich_dungeon2_01: I've got some news for you. The loggers [c_highlight_text]in the forest down in the southwest[/c] are a tough bunch,
en.npc_molevich_dungeon2_02: but lately, they've been a bit restless. Wonder if it has anything to do with old Big Barlu?
en.npc_molevich_dungeon3_01: Hey psst Nia! [c_highlight_text] The gourmet in the lighthouse organizes a cooking duel [/c], the prize should be
en.npc_molevich_dungeon3_02: something special. The lighthouse is located behind the [c_highlight_text] desert in the east of the island. [/c]
en.npc_molevich_dungeon4_01: Hey Nia, I came from the [c_highlight_text]mountaintop,[/c] residents there can't deliver their goods anymore.
en.npc_molevich_final_dungeon_01: There's been some serious rumbling under Koala Village lately,
en.npc_molevich_final_dungeon_02: like, something big is waking up down there.
en.npc_molevich_final_dungeon_03: But hey, I can't dig deep enough to check it out anyway.
en.npc_molevich_final_dungeon_04: Still, I'd love to know what's really going on.
en.obj_molevich_glasshouse_01: Hey man! People are saying there's a strange wall in the big room.
en.obj_molevich_glasshouse_02: Maybe a bomb could destroy it?
en.npc_monkey_golf_01: Hey you! Ever heard of Coconut Golf?
en.npc_monkey_golf_02: It's super easy – you've got to get the coconut into the target area with as few hits as possible.
en.npc_monkey_golf_03: Anything goes! And the best part: fantastic prizes are waiting for you.
en.npc_monkey_golf_after_match_02: hits, that was pretty bananas, huh?
en.npc_monkey_golf_after_match_03: If you're up for another round, swing back over!
en.npc_muscle_man_01: Hey! You're seeing these NICE muscles right? You wanna know what my secret is?
en.npc_muscle_man_02: What, hard work? Haha, nope, for sure not!
en.npc_muscle_man_03: The secret are the [s_inline_heart_coin] [c_highlight_text]Heart Coins[/c]! They're scattered around the island.
en.npc_muscle_man_04: Bring me 4 of 'em, and I can help you with getting fit. It'll increase your health.
en.npc_muscle_man_05: I can see you have 4 [s_inline_heart_coin] [c_highlight_text]Heart Coins[/c], do you want to give them to me?
en.npc_muscle_man_06: If you find 4 [s_inline_heart_coin]  [c_highlight_text]Heart Coins[/c], make sure you bring 'em to me.
en.npc_muscle_man_07: Heart Coins are often pretty well hidden and difficult to reach.
en.npc_muscle_man_when_you_have_may_life_01: Hey, Nia! How's the training going?
en.npc_muscle_man_when_you_have_may_life_02: You're looking super fit, even I can't teach you much more at this point!
en.npc_morain_gang_door_keeper_02: This area is exclusively for members of the Moray Gang!
en.npc_morain_gang_door_keeper_03: With a bit of luck, we might let in a few Tamanegi, but humans?
en.npc_morain_gang_door_keeper_04: Forget it, they can stay outside!
en.npc_morain_gang_door_keeper_1_01_b: Man, I swear by mackerel! They're just so juicy and delicious.
en.npc_morain_gang_door_keeper_2_02_b: They're so slippery and tasty, just irresistible.
en.npc_morain_gang_door_keeper_after_give_t: Oh man, delicious! I'll prepare this right away!
en.npc_morain_gang_door_keeper_02_after_the: I've barely ever eaten such a good eel!
en.npc_morain_gang_door_keeper_01_after_bot: You're not bad for someone without fins, you can come in!
en.npc_morain_gang_door_keeper_02_after_bot: The eel was really delicious! Don't tell anyone that we let you in!
en.npc_moraine_gang_dude_03_01: And then he simply walked away with the crate of melons, without batting an eyelid.
en.npc_moraine_gang_dude_04_01: Haha, that's why we've been stuck with nothing but melons for weeks now... ugh. Truly disgusting stuff.
en.npc_moraine_gang_dude_06_01: Nom nom, Seth and Sylvia seem to have gotten into trouble again!
en.npc_moraine_gang_dude_06_02: Boss wasn't too pleased... what a bunch of losers!
en.npc_moraine_gang_dude_07_01: Hey kid! No idea how you got in here, but the basement's dangerous.
en.npc_nias_mum_tut_01: Your father and I still have a lot to do with the move,
en.npc_nias_mum_tut_02: but in the meantime, you could explore the village. Why not make some friends and see what's going on?
en.npc_nias_mum_tut_03: Koala Village is known for its [c_highlight_text]mysterious shrine.[/c]
en.npc_nias_mum_tut_04: They say no one knows exactly where it came from. Maybe you'll be able to find out more about it?
en.npc_nias_mum_01: Our neighbor told me something's going on on [c_highlight_text]the small farm in the southeast.[/c]
en.npc_nias_mum_02: There's a building there called [c_highlight_text]Greenhouse Rankenstein[/c]... Weird little island....
en.npc_nias_mum_hint_dungeon_2_01: Nia did you know that Seashell Island is known for its special wood? The Barlu-Tree grows
en.npc_nias_mum_hint_dungeon_2_02: only here, and its wood is highly sought after all over the world! [c_highlight_text] The Barlu forest [/c] covers the
en.npc_nias_mum_hint_dungeon_2_03: [c_highlight_text] entire southwestern [/c] half of the island. Certainly an interesting place. I wonder if we
en.npc_nias_mum_hint_dungeon_2_04: will find ancient ruins there too?
en.npc_nias_mum_after_dungeon_2_01: Hello Nia, I've got some exciting news about the island for you!
en.npc_nias_mum_after_dungeon_2_02: The materials here are unique and nowhere else to be found in the world.
en.npc_nias_mum_after_dungeon_2_03: Stones, wood, and many of the plants are real specialties. I wonder why this is...
en.npc_nias_mum_hint_dungeon_4_01: Nia, are you familiar with the geological curiosity of [c_highlight_text] Bran Bran Peak? [/c]
en.npc_nias_mum_hint_dungeon_4_02: It's hollow and full of caves, hot inside, and cold outside.
en.npc_nias_mum_hint_dungeon_4_03: These extremes have greatly hindered attempts to explore it.
en.npc_nias_mum_hint_dungeon_4_04: It almost seems as if... it was intentionally designed to cool the interior of the island.
en.npc_nias_mum_after_dungeon_4_01: This statue has something mysterious about it. The villagers even forbid touching it.
en.npc_nias_mum_after_dungeon_4_02: But... I'd really like to examine it more closely.
en.npc_nias_mum_after_dungeon_4_03: Well, I suppose photos will suffice for the university.
en.npc_nias_dad_tut_01: Hmm, how can we move that through the door...
en.npc_nias_dad_01: I'm currently investigating this ancient idol. It seems to be really very old.
en.npc_nias_dad_after_1_dungeon_01: According to my latest research, there was more than one ancient civilization on this island.
en.npc_nias_dad_after_1_dungeon_02: In any case, I've found objects of two different cultures here.
en.npc_nias_dad_after_3_dungeon_01: According to the inscriptions we found, the ruling race on the island referred to themselves as Volarian...
en.npc_nias_dad_after_3_dungeon_02: Quite intriguing. I wonder if they were exclusive to this island.
en.npc_nias_dad_after_3_dungeon_03: In any case, they seemed to be some sort of bird people.
en.npc_nias_dad_after_2_dungeon_01: The entire village is abuzz with talk of the [c_highlight_text] cooking duel at the lighthouse. [/c]
en.npc_nias_dad_after_2_dungeon_02: Apparently, the lighthouse owner's a wealthy gourmet who regularly invites the best chefs to compete.
en.npc_nias_dad_after_2_dungeon_03: However, it seems like the path to the lighthouse is blocked at the moment,
en.npc_nias_dad_after_2_dungeon_04: and to get there you'd have to traverse the [c_highlight_text] dangerous desert to the east. [/c]
en.npc_nias_dad_after_2_dungeon_05: I hope people prepare well before they go there...
en.npc_nias_dad_after_4_dungeon_01: It appears there were two races or peoples who engaged in conflict here,
en.npc_nias_dad_after_4_dungeon_02: at least that's according to my research. The Volarian clashed with the Ganglion...
en.npc_nias_dad_after_4_dungeon_03: When this happened precisely, I cannot say, but it must have been thousands of years ago.
en.npc_ninja_before_letter_01: You found me!? You must have excellent hiding skills!
en.npc_ninja_before_letter_02: Umm... on the way here did you see a letter carrier by chance?
en.npc_ninja_before_letter_03: I'm expecting a most important and secret package.
en.npc_ninja_with_letter_01: Is that a package for me!?
en.npc_after_letter_01: Thank you for the delivery! DON'T tell anyone about it!
en.npc_after_letter_02: The contents of the package are extremely dangerous... and also quite secret.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_tutorial_02: Look, that big thing in the middle of town? That's  [c_highlight_text]the shrine.[/c] Yup, it's been there forever.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_tutorial_03: Go check it out if ya want. Don't bother me with questions though. I'm busy.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_tutorial_b_01: I already told ya about the shrine, didn't I?
en.npc_old_guy_rost_tutorial_b_02: Now scram, I gotta get on with stuff.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_tutorial_b_03: If you wanna learn more, go see it for yourself. Don't come botherin' me again.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_01_b: Kids of today only play Video Games and waste their time!
en.npc_old_guy_rost_01: I'm 86 now, and to stay fit in your old age, there's only one way:
en.npc_old_guy_rost_02: Eat healthy, with plenty of protein and fiber, and do 30 minutes of exercise every day.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_1_01: When I was a boy, I once saw something very strange.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_1_02: It must have been out in the Barlu Forest, when I was going mushroom picking.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_1_03: It was early in the morning and very foggy. I heard branches cracking,
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_1_04: and when I looked up, there was a strange bird-like figure not far from me.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_1_05: But the fog came in, and obscured it shortly afterward. Nobody in the village believed me.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_3_01: As a teenager, I helped build the gondolas in the desert.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_3_02: It was incredibly dangerous, not just because of the creatures there,
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_3_03: but also because of the deep cliffs and sandstorms. They'll kill you if you're not careful.
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_3_04: We stumbled upon strange ruins back then,
en.npc_old_guy_rost_after_dungeon_3_05: but unfortunately, we didn't have the opportunity to explore them.
en.npc_pickup_guy_desert_01: The way to the farm's blocked by some giant tendrils!
en.npc_pickup_guy_desert_02: I wonder if there's another way.
en.npc_pickup_guy_farm_01: Our dogs are crazy about dog treats. Indeed, so much so, we ran out of them.
en.npc_pickup_guy_with_letter_02: Ah! It's from Yua. She'd like to meet me somewhere!
en.npc_pickup_guy_with_letter_03: Oh dear, I don't have anything to wear. I REALLY need to go get some new clothes!
en.npc_pickup_guy_with_after_letter_01: Oh man, I've gotta go get some new clothes.
en.npc_pickup_guy_with_meeting_with_yua_01: I'm soooo happy that I met Yua. We're dating and see each other regularly now.
en.npc_pirate_boss_after_dungeon_01: Hey shorty, it's almost breaking my pirate heart to say this, but I've gotta admit,
en.npc_pirate_boss_after_dungeon_02: teaming up with these Icebeaks has its perks.
en.npc_pirate_boss_after_dungeon_03: Hard to believe how the work's making it easier for us to get our hands on those delicious cereals.
en.npc_pirate_boss_after_dungeon_04: I hate to say it, but good luck with your mission!
en.npc_pirate_guard_factory_without_milk_01: Hey, you! Get lost! Nobody gets in here! *stomach grumbles*
en.npc_pirate_guard_factory_without_milk_02: Ugh, if only I had some [c_highlight_text]milk[/c] for my tasty Bran Crisps. My brain can't function without my snacks.
en.npc_pirate_guard_factory_thanks_for_milk: Oh, it's the perfect time for this milk to get here! Now I can finally chow down on my Bran Crisps...
Hey, you there! Make sure none of those darn penguins sneak into the factory
en.npc_police_officer_tutorial_01: Oh, you belong to the family that's just moved here?
en.npc_police_officer_tutorial_02: Have you seen [c_highlight_text]the shrine in the middle of the village?[/c]
en.npc_police_officer_tutorial_03: It's one of our landmarks, and definitely worth a visit.
en.npc_police_officer_01: I heard a rumor about something... [shake]REALLY WEIRD [/shake] going on at [c_highlight_text]Alberto's Farm in the South East.
en.npc_police_officer_01_1: That's where [c_highlight_text]Greenhouse Rankenstein[/c] is, and there's always some trouble brewing there.
en.npc_police_officer_02: After Breakfast I might go investigate it... but first I need some Donuts.
en.npc_police_officer_01b: Hmm... should I have a chocolate or a sugar donut...
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_1_01: It seems like all those problems over on Alberto's farm solved themselves!
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_1_02: The next mystery is already unfolding, and of course, I'm right on it!
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_1_03: The usually calm [c_highlight_text]Barlu from the Barlu Forest[/c] has been acting strangely aggressive lately.
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_1_04: After my coffee, I'll head over to check in with the lumberjacks and sort things out.
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_1_05: Don't worry, I've got everything under control!
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_2_01: At the  [c_highlight_text] cook-off in the lighthouse[/c], there's often quite a crowd.
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_2_02: I definitely need to go there to experience some real excitement.
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_2_03: People really get pushed around energetically there, you know.
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_2_04: I have to book a few guys every year.
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_3_01: I'm gonna grab a bagel first, then I gotta check out the broken elevator leading up to  [c_highlight_text]Igloo Heights.[/c]
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_3_02: Have you ever been there? It's located  [c_highlight_text] northwest of Koala Village. [/c]
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_4_01: This morning, there was a tremor  [c_highlight_text] beneath the village. [/c]
en.npc_police_officer_after_dungeon_4_02: I wonder what's going on down there. Whatever it is... it can wait until I've had my hotdog.
en.npc_post_woman_01_tutorial: Come back later, we'll be open soon!
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_01: Oh hi... we uhh... have a little problem here.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_02: Our usual mailman's unfortunately had to drop out due to his paper allergy.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_03: I'm a little embarrassed to ask somebody who's new here, but could you deliver the last 4 letters?
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_05: If you deliver all four letters, you'll get a [c_highlight_text]universal translator.[/c]
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_05_01: It lets you understand any language ... and, of course, you'll meet all the weir...
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_06: I mean, most interesting people on the island.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_07: Well, do you want to deliver the four letters?
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_02_yes: I forgot, there's a catch, we don't have house numbers here,
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_03_yes: so I'm only able to describe to you where the letters have to go.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_letter_a_01: The first person lives under a fallen tree trunk at the edge of the Barlu forest...
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_01_no: Uhm... no time at the moment.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_intro_02_no: Ok, if you change your mind, you know where to find me.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_next_letter: Oh, great! You delivered the letter, here's the next one for you.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_letter_b_01: The second letter needs to be delivered to someone who frequently hangs out in overalls and wears a red cap.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_letter_b_02: You'll probably find him in the southeastern area of the island.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_letter_c_01: The third letter goes to a dog lover. Beware of the guard dog!
en.npc_post_woman_quest_letter_d_01: The fourth letter's for a ninja super fan. I can't tell you much about him,
en.npc_post_woman_quest_letter_d_02: for some reason he can hide himself pretty damn well, and his house is surrounded by a moat!
en.npc_post_woman_quest_letter_all_finished: So that's all the letters! Thank you. I guess you deserve a reward, huh?
I have an old book here,
I don't know how it ever found its way into the library
and I don't know what it's about, but I'm sure you could use it for something.
en.npc_post_woman_quest_over: Thanks for the help with the letters. Hopefully the other guy will be back to work tomorrow.
en.npc_post_woman_letter_01: Yeah, I know it's just a demo.
en.npc_photographer_door_note_01: The Island Daily office is closed today.
en.npc_photographer_door_note_02: I'm on a wild hunt for stories, most likely at the cook-off.
en.npc_photographer_door_note_03: If you urgently need me, try again later.
en.npc_photographer_door_note_04: Otherwise, I'm chasing the thrill of headlines!
en.npc_photographer_door_note_05: See you soon, and hopefully without too much paper stacked up in the office. Goodbye!
en.npc_photographer_town_intro_02: As a journalist and a master of research, I've been tracking your progress for quite a while.
en.npc_photographer_town_outro_01: Oh, you might want to avoid that last one. That could have consequences.
en.npc_photographer_farm_01: Hey, I'm Peter from the Island Daily! I'm always on the lookout for the latest headlines.
en.npc_photographer_farm_02: There's gotta be something exciting that happened around here, my nose for thrilling stories is itching!
en.npc_photographer_after_barlu_01: Uh, I can't believe it, you just got spit out by the Big Barlu...
en.npc_photographer_after_barlu_02: Fortunately, I managed to snap a photo of it... nobody would have believed me otherwise.
en.npc_photographer_after_factory_01: So, so, it seems Igloo Heights was besieged by pirates,
en.npc_photographer_after_factory_02: and as a result, Koala Village suffered from a severe shortage of cereals.
en.npc_photographer_after_factory_03: Yeah... I'm sure of it... this is definitely headline material!
en.npc_rope_kids_trumpet_01: Hey you! We just came from the [c_highlight_text]beach just below the village.[/c]
en.npc_rope_kids_trumpet_02: Man that was the totally loud noise. sounded like a strange [c_highlight_text]Trumpet[/c] or something.
en.npc_rope_kids_trumpet_01_b: I wonder who makes that loud noise on [c_highlight_text]the beach?[/c]
en.npc_rope_kids_trumpet_02_b: Even my Dad could have been woken up with this on a sunday morning!
en.npc_rope_kid_a_more_01: Remus is quite the adventurer, he always ends up in the most impossible places on the island.
en.npc_rope_kid_b_more_01: My dad told me about the Cat God recently.
en.npc_rope_kid_b_more_02: He said he's supposed to live somewhere here on the island... Parents really believe anything...
en.npc_rival_igloo_heights_pub_01: Did a rice cooker just hop into the pub? The village seems to be flooded with pirates.
en.npc_rival_igloo_heights_pub_02: Let's see if we can figure out what they want here.
en.npc_rival_igloo_heights_pub_03: Maybe the rice cooker has something to do with it.
en.npc_rival_igloo_heights_front_factory_01: I suspect the pirates are after something in the cereal factory,
en.npc_rival_igloo_heights_front_factory_02: but I can't get past this guard.
en.npc_rival_igloo_heights_front_factory_03: This guy acts like he's the guardian of a secret cereal treasure.
en.npc_rival_factory_entrance_hall_01: It seems someone turned off the power.
en.npc_rival_factory_entrance_hall_02: Maybe we can find the main switch and get everything back up and running.
en.npc_rival_factory_switch_room_01: Wonder if you can roll snowballs on the switch.
en.npc_rival_before_karasu_takes_the_gears_: Come on, let's hurry and bring the gears to Karasu.
en.npc_rival_before_throne_room_01: Ah, it's you, Nia! How deep do you think we are beneath the surface?
en.npc_rival_before_throne_room_02: I believe this path leads to some kind of throne room. Could Karasu be in there?
en.npc_sea_dog_01: You wonder why I'm simply sitting here? The wild season's just begun.
en.npc_sea_dog_02: Now, monstrous storms will rage around Seashell Island for the next three months.
en.npc_sea_dog_03: The island's completely cut off from the outside world...
en.npc_sea_dog_04: and well, I'm a fisherman, so I've got nothing better to do for now.
en.npc_soup_woman_refill: Why hello there, would you like a refill on your ramen again? It costs only
en.npc_soup_woman_already_full: Oh, your bowl's already full! I love it! Come back later when you need more ramen.
en.npc_soup_woman_no_bowl_1: Hi, I'm Dana, and I sell my super delicious ramen all over the island. Trust me, it's the BEST!
en.npc_soup_woman_no_bowl_2: Gimme your ramen bowl, and I'll fill it up for you for a price I'll bankrupt myself with!
en.npc_soup_woman_no_bowl_3: Oh! you don't have a bowl yet? Well then, I'll give you one for free as a new customer.
en.npc_soup_woman_lighthouse_01: I'm not going miss Mr Presunto's Grand Cook-Off, that's for sure.
en.npc_soup_woman_lighthouse_02: I find it inspiring to see so many phenomenal chefs at work.
en.npc_soup_woman_lighthouse_03: It was the only way I was gradually able to develop my ramen recipe into a masterful treat!
en.npc_soup_woman_lighthouse_04: I'm really impressed, how'd you learn to cook so well?
en.npc_soup_woman_lighthouse_05: It's very unusual at your age.
en.npc_shop_granny_tutorial_01: Hello young lady, I'm afraid we're not open yet... do come back a little later!
en.npc_shop_granny_tutorial_01_b: Something seemed strange to me this morning, about that old statue at the village square...
en.npc_shop_granny_tutorial_02_b: Maybe it was just imagination, at my age you never know.
en.npc_shop_granny_01: Hello my dear, can I help you with anything?
en.npc_shop_granny_02_before_d1: Unfortunately, we've got almost no groceries in stock at the moment.
en.npc_shop_granny_03_before_d1: The deliveries from the farm were supposed to have arrived by now, but it seems we'll have to wait.
en.npc_shop_granny_02_before_d4: The delivery of our breakfast cereals has unfortunately been delayed.
en.npc_shop_granny_03_before_d4: I wonder what's going on over in Igloo Heights... The Icebeaks are usually very reliable and punctual.
en.npc_shop_granny_01_b: We have the best offers far and wide!
en.npc_skg_simone_01: Hi, I'm Simone, but you might also know me as Schmoedraws.
en.npc_skg_simone_02: I created concepts and artworks for Under the Island.
en.npc_skg_simone_03: My favorite is Nekogami, the cat god.
en.npc_skg_simone_04: Enjoy the rest of your journey on Seashell Island!
en.npc_skg_johannes_01: Ah, the player! I didn't think you would find us here.
en.npc_skg_johannes_02: I hope you are enjoying the adventure so far.
en.npc_skg_johannes_03: We have worked on Under the Island for over seven years,
en.npc_skg_johannes_04: and a lot of hard work and love has gone into this game.
en.npc_skg_johannes_05: If you are reading this, we are probably already working on our next game.
en.npc_skg_johannes_06: Whatever it may be, I can promise you that we will give it our all once again!
en.npc_skg_johannes_07: We are very grateful that you chose to spend your hard-earned money
en.npc_skg_johannes_08: and valuable time on Under the Island.
en.npc_skg_johannes_09: Please continue to support us in the future so that we can keep making even better games.
en.npc_skg_johannes_10: So, enjoy the rest of the adventure!
en.npc_swamp_chicken_01: I'm not in the mood to sell ya stuff right now... someone stole mah awesome readin' material.
en.npc_swamp_chicken_02: Oh, ya brought me back my uhm...*cough readin' material.
en.npc_swamp_chicken_03: I'll open my little store here for ya, in exchange.
en.npc_swamp_chicken_04: The Old Viaduct out there's been dry for a looong time. Who knows who built this old junk in the first place.
en.npc_swamp_chicken_04_b: For a while now, we've been having these damn earthquakes. The Big Barlu is restless!
en.npc_surfer_dude_hint_01: Hey, everything easy? Lately, it's been [c_highlight_text]really loud on the beach. [/c]
en.npc_surfer_dude_hint_02: Even the dead would wake to that noise!
en.npc_surfer_dude_hint_03: Well, in any case, I can't surf properly because of it, so I'll take a break here for now.
en.npc_surfer_dude_on_beach_01: Hey, everything goin' easy? In the wild season, surfing can get really bad.
en.npc_surfer_dude_on_beach_02: The storms around the island mean that murderously high waves sometimes arrive here.
en.npc_tabasco_before_the_cookoff_01: Hey, do you actually know who you're talking to?!
en.npc_tabasco_before_the_cookoff_02: I'm Tabasco, and I'm gonna win the Cook-Off this year!
en.npc_tamanegi_gentleman_01: Hey Human! Are you here for the big show too? I'm already sooo excited for it!
en.npc_tamanegi_gentleman_01_b: The tickets were terribly expensive... I had to spend my entire fortune on them...
en.npc_tamanegi_gentleman_02_b: Some of the guys in here are pretty mad because they, uhh, couldn't get a ticket, so beware.
en.npc_tamanegi_gentleman_phase1: Our primary objective's to restore the generator to operational status.
en.npc_tamanegi_gentleman_phase1_end: Ok! Now, let's go up the ladder, we can watch the show from above.
en.npc_tamanegi_gentleman_dungeon_completed: If you're looking for more relics, you should try asking around in Koala Village!
en.npc_tamanegi_in_queue_two_01: They said we've got to put our Weapons in this Box.
en.npc_tamanegi_door_keeper_01_no_key: Do you have a ticket? No? Then you'd better get outta here!
en.npc_tamanegi_door_keeper_01: Ohh little Human, I see you've got a VIP ticket there! Let me open the VIP entrance for you.
en.npc_tamanegi_door_keeper_02: But I've got to ask you, do you have any weapons on you at the moment?
en.npc_tamanegi_door_keeper_03: Oh, okay, this is just a Hockey Stick, not a Weapon. You can pass, enjoy!
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_01: Ah, a human! An exceedingly rare encounter. My name is Zwiebelstein,
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_02: and I dedicate my time to the profound act of exploring the origins of the Tamanegi.
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_03: This library once belonged to the Volarian, an ancient race that has nearly been erased from history.
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_04: It appears they were the creators of the Tamanegi.
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_05: When they thrived, the Volarians were masters of biotechnology, shaping nature to their will.
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_06: We Tamanegi are the result of their sublime creation, originally intended to serve them in their manual tasks.
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_07: But unlike the Volarian, who perished, we have endured through millennia.
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_09: I harbor the urgent warning that the Volarian devised formidable weapons within this domain.
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_10: Should you proceed further into this area,
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_a_11: you are likely to encounter exceedingly perilous creatures. Beware the eyes of darkness!
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_b_01: For many decades, I have found my abode here,
en.npc_tamanegi_wise_guy_b_02: dedicating myself to the laborious task of book translation.
en.npc_tamanegi_boy_01_01: So this is what a human looks like!
en.npc_tamanegi_boy_03_01: Finally, dad's back with the food! My stomach's already growling! I'm sooo hungry!
en.npc_tamanegi_boy_04_01: Dad, can we keep the human? She looks cute.
en.npc_tamanegi_girl_02_01: Do all humans have such a huge nose?
en.npc_tamanegi_girl_03_01: Papa says we have to be careful around humans!
en.npc_tamanegi_thief_after_quest_01: Because you helped us, I'm going to let you in on a little secret.
en.npc_tamanegi_thief_after_quest_02: The skeleton cyclobats can be destroyed FOREVER with a fireball!
en.npc_tamanegi_thief_after_quest_03: They also leave behind valuable slime.
en.npc_tamanegi_udon_guy_02: I come here every day to enjoy the excellent Udon from Edamame.
en.npc_technician_after_quest_01: Oh, hey, it's you. Nia, right? I'm hanging out with these fools.
en.npc_technician_after_quest_02: ...because you live longer with more social contact, apparently.
en.npc_tourist_guide_before_item_given_01: Welcome to the Seashell Island Tourist Office!
en.npc_tourist_guide_before_item_given_02: This time of year, it's a bit quieter due to the storms around the island.
en.npc_tourist_guide_before_item_given_03: That's why I'm using this time to prepare for the upcoming season.
en.npc_tourist_guide_before_item_given_04: And, uh... as you can see,
en.npc_tourist_guide_before_item_given_05: the office could use a few more lovely  [c_highlight_text] plants [/c] to make it cozier.
en.npc_tourist_guide_when_you_have_the_item: Oh, are those [s_inline_flower_seeds]  from Lily? They're just what I needed!
en.npc_tourist_guide_after_the_item_01: Ah, thank you so much for the seeds!
en.npc_tourist_guide_after_the_item_02: In return, I'll share a secret with you.
en.npc_tourist_guide_after_the_item_03: If you follow the road to the west, you'll come across a cave. Inside, there are three switches.
en.npc_tourist_guide_after_the_item_04: Hit them in this order: [c_highlight_text] Right, Right, Left, Right, and Center. [/c]
en.npc_tourist_guide_after_the_item_05: I don't know what's inside the cave, as I've never dared to go further.
en.npc_wondering_merchant_01: Nice to meet a new vic... I mean, a new Customer!
en.npc_wondering_merchant_03: I offer the finest, most exquisite goods at a price you can not refuse!
en.npc_wondering_merchant_04: You shall never find me in one place for long, because I travel the entire island.
en.npc_wondering_merchant_05: Hey look at my new jun... err, goods.
en.npc_wood_dino_01: I've been waiting all day for the newest issue of Shareholder magazine,
en.npc_wood_dino_02: but the mailman hasn't shown up yet.
en.npc_wood_dino_03: You might not think so, but I'm actually a stock market specialist and investor.
en.npc_wood_dino_04: I've invested all my money into stocks, so I live a pretty spartan life here.
en.npc_wood_dino_01_b: A tip from me... invest in something you like very much, at a price you like very much.
en.npc_wood_dino_02_b: Then close your eyes for 10 years, metaphorically, of course.
en.npc_wood_dino_letter_01: Oh, is that a letter for me?
en.npc_wood_dino_after_letter_01: Thanks for the letter, now I can go about my business in peace!
en.npc_vida_dungeon_completed: Nia, you're such a good person, thank you so much!
en.npc_sawmill_worker_01: HEY! What are you doing here! You're not allowed to be here!
en.cutscene_intro_world_02: It took approximately 3 billion years for the first multicellular organisms to appear.
en.cutscene_intro_world_03: Only 1.5 billion years later, what we know as the modern human emerged.
en.cutscene_intro_world_04: Every living being was shaped over this time through the long process of evolution.
en.cutscene_intro_02: Nia, aren't you excited about Seashell Island?
en.cutscene_intro_03: Oh, totally. Moving to a tiny island with zero connection to the real world? My dream come true.
en.cutscene_intro_04: Oh, come on. It'll be an adventure. You might even like it.
en.cutscene_intro_05: Dad, this island is the middle of nowhere. No concerts, no parties...
en.cutscene_intro_06: just sand, palm trees, and a bunch of retirees.
en.cutscene_intro_07: You don't even know who lives there yet. There might be some surprises.
en.cutscene_intro_09: The university says your dad and I only need about a year
en.cutscene_intro_11: A year? And what about the storms? Three months cut off from everything?
en.cutscene_intro_12: No calls, no letters, no way to even hang out with anyone!
en.cutscene_intro_13: Oh, sweetheart, those months will fly by, you'll see.
en.cutscene_intro_14: I know you're doing this for your work, and I get it, but...
en.cutscene_intro_14_1: I'm really going to miss my friends.
en.cutscene_intro_15: No one to hang out with, no fun stuff to do... it's just gonna feel so lonely.
en.cutscene_intro_16: We'll make the best of it, I promise!
en.cutscene_intro_17: And who knows? People say Seashell Island is full of mysteries.
en.cutscene_intro_18: Maybe you'll find adventures you never expected.
en.cutscene_intro_19: Right. Like helping grumpy neighbors carry their groceries.
en.cutscene_intro_20: Well, look on the bright side...
en.cutscene_intro_21: ...here we are! Welcome to our new home!
en.cutscene_town_street_stopper: I should check out the Village first.
en.cutscene_town_door_closed_flower_girl: I'm training right now, come back later. - M. Uscle
en.cutscene_town_shrine_01: Hi! Are you the new girl who just moved here? Nice to meet you, I'm Avocado.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_02: Hey Avocado, I'm Nia. You got a reason for hanging out here?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_03: Um, right over here's the shrine of the Storm God Arashi.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_04: During the Wild Season, the villagers bring seashells over to appease Arashi.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_05: I was just there, looking at all the beautiful shells. Ahh, they're so pretty!
en.cutscene_town_shrine_07: Yes, legend has it that this is why all those wild storms we get end after three months.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_08: Would you like to see the shrine?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_09: Why not? I don't have anything better to do anyway.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_11: Here we are. I know the island pretty well.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_12: I work as a tour guide for tourists during the holidays!
en.cutscene_town_shrine_13: Feel free to ask me anything about the shrine or the island.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_14: Uh, yeah, it's not bad around here, I guess. You can tell people care about the place.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_15: Stop, Nia! You can't touch the shrine. It's strictly forbidden to do that!
en.cutscene_town_shrine_16: Even when placing seashells on the shrine, we make sure not to touch it with our hands.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_17: Tradition says that this could provoke the wrath of Arashi...
en.cutscene_town_shrine_18: Oh, come on, that's just superstition, right?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_21: What have you done? Luckily, nothing's broken, but
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_02: Are you okay? Are you hurt?
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_03: No, I'm fine, it's just a few bruises.
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_04: But why on earth did you touch the shrine?!
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_05: I'm sorry, I couldn't have known what would happen...
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_06: Yes, and that's precisely why we've got rules!
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_07: Where are we anyway? Do you know this place?
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_08: Hmm, I've never seen it before.
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_09: There's been all sorts of ruins discovered on Seashell Island in the past, but this must be a new one.
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_10: Let's explore the area, maybe we'll find a way out.
en.cutscene_town_fall_inside_shrine_11: Let's hope so... but don't touch anything unfamiliar again!
en.cutscene_town_blocked_way: This way seems to be blocked, we'll need something to break through the bushes.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_01: Hey, who... or rather, what are you?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_02: I could ask you the same, little one who trespasses so boldly.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_03: I am Karasu, one of the Volarian people.
