en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_04: Huh, Volarian? I've never heard of them before.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_05: That's because we've been gone for thousands of years. Extinct.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_06: I am likely the last of my kind, living here on this [c_highlight_text]Ark.[/c]
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_07: Jeez... but what's this [c_highlight_text]Ark[/c]? What's that supposed to mean?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_08: Ah, forgive me. This island you stand on... it's no ordinary island.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_09: We created it thousands of years ago, to safeguard life on this planet.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_10: Wait, you're telling me that you Volarians made this island? That's... incredible!
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_11: Incredible? Perhaps once. But now, it faces ruin. The Ark is sinking.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_14: HUH!? We've gotta warn everyone! They need to evacuate!
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_15: I wish it were that simple, but it's far too late.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_16: The storms that shield the Ark have already begun.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_17: No one can leave for the next three months,
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_18: and the Ark won't last that long without its [c_highlight_text]central gears.[/c]
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_19: [c_highlight_text]Central gears?[/c] Are those things which like, keep this Ark thing stable or whatever?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_20: The Ark is powered by [c_highlight_text]four special gears[/c],
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_21: crafted from materials infused with unique properties.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_22: A few years ago, traitors stole them. Without those gears, the island is doomed.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_24: Why would they do that if those gears are so important to keeping this island... I mean, Ark, afloat!?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_25: That is besides the point. The problem that we must deal with at hand,
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_26: is that they simply have been stolen, and without them our fate is sealed.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_27: But can't you bring them back or build new ones?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_28: I am too old to retrieve them, nor do I have the power to create new ones.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_29: But your arrival here... I have been alone in this place for countless years, waiting for someone.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_30: It must be fate that Torogami sent you to me.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_31: Alright then, we'll go find these [c_highlight_text]gears.[/c] But how do we even start looking?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_32: The gears are not ordinary objects.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_33: They attract the unusual, events, creatures, phenomena. They stand out.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_34: I've lived here a long time, and know this place can be weird at times...
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_36: Volarian technology often seems impossible to others.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_37: According to my research, one of the gears lies [c_highlight_text]southeast[/c] of here, on the surface.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_38: Beyond that, I cannot guide you. You must rely on your wits and the help of others.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_39: Uh, okay... But how do we get out of here?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_40: In the chest behind me, you'll find a [c_highlight_text]sacred weapon.[/c] It will aid you on your journey.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_42: Before you go, tell me, what are your names?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_43: This is Nia and I'm Avocado.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_44: Nia and Avocado... Be cautious, both of you.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_45: The path ahead will test you in ways you cannot imagine.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_exposition_46: May the winds carry you far!
en.cutscene_town_shrine_sword_01: There's a letter in the chest. It says:
en.cutscene_town_shrine_sword_02: Sorry bro, took the sword. Left you this instead!
en.cutscene_town_shrine_sword_03: That Hockey Stick should be good enough to get us out...
en.cutscene_town_shrine_sword_bushes_01: Use the stick to destroy the bushes.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_sword_bushes_02: If I remember right, using sticks is done by pressing
en.cutscene_town_shrine_arena_01: You've got the stick, I'll wait here until you've cleared the way.
en.cutscene_leaving_the_shrine_02: This seems to be the exit. We should split up to find the gears faster, don't you think?
en.cutscene_leaving_the_shrine_03: In the [c_highlight_text]southeast[/c], on Alberto's farm, stands [c_highlight_text]Greenhouse Rankenstein[/c].
en.cutscene_leaving_the_shrine_03_1: Strange things happen there often. Let's check it out first.
en.cutscene_leaving_the_shrine_04: Hey, that's not fair. You already know the island inside out!
en.cutscene_leaving_the_shrine_05: Pfft, as if this were some kinda game!
en.cutscene_leaving_the_shrine_06: You might not have been here for long, but I've lived my whole life on this island...
en.cutscene_leaving_the_shrine_09: I might not have any attachment to this island, but I value my life.
en.cutscene_leaving_the_shrine_10: So, [c_highlight_text]southeast[/c] to [c_highlight_text]Greenhouse Rankenstein[/c]... See you later!
en.cutscene_town_shrine_left_1: Psst, hey there! New in town, huh?
en.cutscene_town_shrine_left_2: I'm Molevich, your go-to guy for all the juicy gossip.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_left_3: If you ever hit a roadblock, swing by, and I'll drop a hint your way.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_left_4: Word on the street is, once you've gathered enough clues, your destination pops up on the map...
en.cutscene_town_shrine_left_5: By the way, if you want to access the menu or check the map, simply press
en.cutscene_town_shrine_left_6: Easy, right? But enough chit-chat for now.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_left_7: Here's a little welcome gift that'll surely come in handy.
en.cutscene_town_shrine_left_8: I'm sure you're ready to explore the island. Enjoy!
en.cutscene_bombhouse_bridge_falldown_01: Ouch! Why do I keep falling down everywhere on this island!?
en.cutscene_cave_grave_yard_map_01: Oh, a diary! Someone must have lived here before the entry got buried by stones.
en.cutscene_cave_grave_yard_map_02: I think I've almost found the treasure; I'm really close.
en.cutscene_cave_grave_yard_map_03: Today I solved the puzzle to open the entrance. Tomorrow, I'm going to explore the cave...
en.cutscene_cave_grave_yard_map_04: There's a piece paper stuck between the pages, with some sort of map on it...
en.cutscene_inua_quest_beach_03: I think you washed up here.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_beach_06: Oh, I've never heard of it.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_beach_07: My boat got caught in a storm, and after that, I don't remember anything...
en.cutscene_inua_quest_beach_08: Is there a place where I can stay?
en.cutscene_inua_quest_beach_09: Try Koala Village, you'll find it just a little north of here.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_beach_11: Thank you! I'll go check it out right away.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_beach_12: Oh, and by the way, my name is Trophus.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_beach_13: Make sure to visit me there, I'll have something to thank you for saving me.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_village_01: Hey Nia, I found this nice tree and thought I could build a Treehouse in it.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_village_02: But there's one problem... I need some more Wooden Planks to build with.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_village_03: I went to the sawmill west of town, but they wouldn't sell me any lumber.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_village_04: Sneaking in and looking for some free-wood would be option B.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_village_05: I can't show you my surprise until I've finished building the house!
en.cutscene_inua_quest_giving_wood_01: Are those Wooden Planks? You'd give them to me?
en.cutscene_inua_quest_giving_wood_02: Thank you, that's very kind of you!
en.cutscene_inua_first_time_museum_01: Oh, hi Nia, there you are. Now I can show you my surprise!
en.cutscene_inua_first_time_museum_03: All your special achievements are displayed here.
en.cutscene_inua_first_time_museum_04: It's also my house, so try not to mess the place up! Take your time to look around.
en.cutscene_inua_quest_waiting_to_build_01: If you come by later, my new house should be ready.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_intro_1: Oh, have humans started attending my shows nowadays?
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_intro_2: Not really, I'm looking for an object, an Ancient Gear Wheel. Have you seen something like that?
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_intro_3: Hmm...I might know what you're talking about, but while I'd love to assist, my dear,
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_intro_4: I'm afraid I can't be of help right now.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_intro_6: Madam Vida is preparing for her grand performance today,
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_intro_7: and unfortunately, the elevator to the stage is out of order.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_intro_8: Ah! Maybe I can lend a hand!
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_intro_9: If you assist me with my show, I can guide you straight to your elusive gearwheel.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_intro_1: Your willingness is truly appreciated, my dear ones.
Let's roll! By the way, I'm Nia.
It's a pleasure to meet such a lively young spirit.
I'm Vida, and this is my most dedicated fan, Tama.
I, too, shall stand by the illustrious Madam Vida. What an honor!
To tackle the generator issue, we need to kindle the fire within.
But be careful, the machine seems to be quite a bit out of control...
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_1_blocker: I should focus on helping Vida with her gig.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_2_fire_in: Hey, it's too dark in here! Something's wrong with the lights.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_2_puzzle_: Ah, Tama, could you help me find a way to the other side?
I'll keep trying to ignite the lamps here!
It's crucial that all of the lamps are ignited simultaneously,
or the entire performance could turn into a disaster!
No problem, leave the chandeliers to me!
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_2_blocker: No time to go back, I have to keep the light aglow.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_2_end: Hey Nia, over here! Follow me downstairs, I need some help there!
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_phase_3_puzzle_: Ah, well done on reaching this point!
Down yonder at the end of the corridor, there are some wild fans who seem eager to storm the stage.
Would you mind holding them at bay while I attempt unlocking the backstage door over there?
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_ending_1: The show was fantastic, thank you two so much! Of course, I shall keep my promise to you.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_ending_2: Nia, the gear you've likely been seeking is hanging behind you on the wall.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_ending_3: Now that the magnificent performance has concluded,
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_ending_4: the atmosphere in the Greenhouse Rankenstein will once again return to a state of tranquility.
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_ending_5: Finally... no more riots in the Greenhouse Rankenstein!
en.cutscene_boss_glasshouse_ending_6: Thanks a bunch! Catch you later!
en.cutscene_after_glasshouse_2: You won't believe it! I discovered one of the gears right here in Greenhouse Rankenstein.
en.cutscene_after_glasshouse_3: Oh great, that's just what we need...
en.cutscene_after_glasshouse_5: Well done, Nia! And the greenhouse is still standing!
en.cutscene_after_glasshouse_6: And it's doing even better than before. I took care of the rampaging Tamanegis.
en.cutscene_after_glasshouse_7: Well then, let's head back to [c_highlight_text]Koala Village[/c] and gather some more information.
en.cutscene_after_glasshouse_8: Let's see if there's any unusual occurrences that'll help lead us to the [c_highlight_text]next gear.[/c]
en.cutscene_forest_frog_sleeping_1: Slumbering, like a bear in winter.
en.cutscene_forest_frog_sleeping_2: To wake this dude up, I need something that makes a lot of noise.
en.cutscene_water_facility_intro_1: Wow... these waterworks must be ancient.
en.cutscene_water_facility_intro_2: ...and the water reserves still seem to be intact!
en.cutscene_water_facility_intro_3: Maybe that big ol' Barlu's hiding around here somewhere.
en.cutscene_water_facility_intro_4: If these gears really attract all things strange and weird,
en.cutscene_water_facility_intro_5: the next one could be riiiiiight around where he's at.
en.cutscene_water_facility_main_switch_acti: Ha! Seems like the water in the forest's flowing again! But where's the gear?
en.cutscene_water_facility_drain_room_switc: Huh... seems like something turned the water off!
en.cutscene_inside_big_barlu_before_boss_02: Can you get me out of here?
en.cutscene_inside_big_barlu_before_boss_04: Of course, a monster, what else...
en.cutscene_inside_big_barlu_end_01: I think something's happening! Get ready!
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_01: Ouch, that was a really rough landing!
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_02: Finally... a breath of fresh air.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_03: But hey, thanks a lot for helping me out just now!
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_04: Without you, I'd still be stuck, swamped up in Barlu's warm goo... ugh!
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_05: By the way, I'm Lemon. Nice to meet you.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_07: This forest really is spectacular! It's so impressive seeing all the nature.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_08: I only just fixed the water supply for it a second ago,
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_09: and already, everything's become so overgrown.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_10: Yeah, that's the crazy thing about this place.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_11: The plants here have this AMAZING ability to regenerate in no time!
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_12: Nature really goes wild here; it's truly unique.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_13: You seem to know your way around.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_14: Well, I must confess I'm some sort of a treasure hunter.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_15: But please, don't spread the word. This island is full of secrets,
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_16: and over time, I've discovered quite a few artifacts and treasures.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_17: Wow, treasure hunting? That sounds so cool! By the way, I'm looking for an ancient artifact,
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_18: it looks like a gear. Have you ever seen something like that around here?
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_19: As a matter of fact, I did find such a piece over in the old water facility.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_20: I was thinking about adding it to my collection,
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_21: but since you helped me out of that mess, it's yours now.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_22: Oh, and take this Lifejuice too, it'll give you a boost of energy.
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_23: That's just what I need right now! Thank you so much!
en.cutscene_after_big_barlu_24: I need to head off now, come and visit me in my house in Koala Village sometime.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_outside_intro_01: Wow, now that's what I'd call a giant lighthouse.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_outside_intro_02: Let's see if anyone around here's seen one of the gears.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_01: You seem to be interested in the trophy?
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_02: I am Mr. Presunto, gourmet and owner of this establishment.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_03: This trophy is intended for the winner of the local [c_highlight_text] Mr Presuntos Grand Cook-Off.[/c]
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_04: But the, uhh, "trophy" is really important for saving the island!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_05: Can't you give anything else to the winners?
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_07: Child, the island is lost if we don't keep up the standards of food at the highest, gourmet levels!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_08: By that, I mean no! If you want the trophy, then [c_highlight_text]win the Cook-Off![/c]
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_09: ...but what am I even saying? Only specially selected chefs are allowed to participate.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_10: If you don't have an [c_highlight_text]Invitation[/c] [s_inline_invitation], you can't participate.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_11: And how do I get such an /n [c_highlight_text]Invitation[/c] [s_inline_invitation]?
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_12: They've all been sent out already.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_13: Only one chef hasn't accepted yet, the best of them all, [c_highlight_text]Master Pankeki.[/c]
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_14: Hmm, the little one could really become a problem,
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_15: if she visits old Pankeki [c_highlight_text]southwest[/c] of here.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_gourmet_intro_16: I should take care of that, better now than later... Huhuhu.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_outside_bird_and_cat: Hmph, if I don't do something, the cat'll chow down on the bird!
Well then, onward to the adventure, little Hiku. We must find [c_highlight_text]the master chef Pankeki.[/c]
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_01: Hey old man, are you Master Pankeki?
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_02: Who're you calling an old man?! Have a little more respect for your elders!
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_03: And yes, I am Pankeki. Who are you anyway?
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_04: Oh, err, I'm Nia. I urgently need your help so I can take part in the big cook-off!
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_06: Only someone who is my student is allowed to fight, but I haven't had one in many years.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_07: But it's really important, it's about the safety of the people on this island!
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_08: Well, there is one way to prove to me that you are worthy of being my student.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_09: A master chef must be able to gather his own spices and ingredients,
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_10: because only then can he be sure to use the best of the best.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_11: Without this understanding, you cannot become a master!
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_12: There is an [c_highlight_text]old mine on the road to the farm [/c], where you can find the [c_highlight_text]Deep-Salt.[/c]
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_13: ...and you want me to go get it?
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_14: Right. However, there is... just a small problem.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_15: The mine is very old, and you can't get deep enough to find the Deep-Salt on your own.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_16: Unfortunately, I can't go there with you.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_17: You see, I have a huge stew on the flame here and I can't leave.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_18: What are you doing here! Do you also want to take part in the cook-off?
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_19: Yes, and I was here first!
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_20: As if that means anything. I'm a much better cook than you, hmph!
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_21: Oh, you've got NO idea how good I can cook!
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_22: Holy fried potato! Stop it, and stop it now.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_23: Look, when you're in the kitchen, everyone has to work together, it's teamwork.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_24: You can both become my disciples if you get me [c_highlight_text]the deep salt from the old mine.[/c]
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_25: But you've got to work together, otherwise neither of you'll be able to get it.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_26: Hmph, if that's the only way.... Nia, I'll wait for you at the entrance to the old mine.
en.cutscene_master_pankeki_first_time_27: If you head towards [c_highlight_text]the farm from here[/c], you'll pass it.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_0_01: Let's get it over with and get the deep salt....
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_1_01: It seems like this old mine cart's the only way deeper into the mine.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_1_02: ...and it takes two people to drive it.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_1_03: Okay, well... if that's what it takes, let's get this over with.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_1_b_01: Looks like you need two people to use this.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_01: Haha, that was one helluva intense ride!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_02: [shake]HOW CAN YOU BE SO CHEERFUL ABOUT THAT!?[/shake]
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_03: We almost fell off and down the abyss!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_04: But we didn't, right? So there's noooo problem at all!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_05: Hmph. Fine, let's keep looking for the deep salt.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_b_01: Both gates are locked... I wonder if there's a switch around here somewhere?
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_c_01: This'll let us head deeper into the mine.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_c_02: Hey Nia, I discovered a switch here!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_d_01: There's a fold-out bridge on my side, but unfortunately I can't find a switch here.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_d_02: Can you look around on your side if you find one?
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_d_03: I'll see what I can find.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_2_b_blocker: I should help Avocado cross the bridge first.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_3_01: I think we need something to put on the toggle there.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_3_02: Here's an old machine... maybe it'll still be in working order and can help us.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_a_01: I think I can activate the bridge with this.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_a_02: Hmph, the switch sure is cranky, the old rusty beast!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_a_03: Avo, quickly, away from the cliff!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_a_04: Hang in there, I'll be right with you!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_b_01: Nia hurry up, I can't hold on much longer!!!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_c_01: Holy Arashi! that was close.... *huff *huff* Thanks, Nia.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_c_02: Oh, man you gave me quite a scare!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_c_03: This time, you didn't even need my help to tumble and almost fall into the depths.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_c_05: I have a feeling we're getting very close to the [c_highlight_text]deep salt.[/c]
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_d_01: Hmm, that one over there... yep, that looks like the deep salt to me!
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_d_02: I guess it hasn't been refined yet, though.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_e_03: Without you, I wouldn't have stood a chance in that abandoned mine.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_e_04: Haha, it's okay, we made it together. But we're not out of here yet.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_e_05: I'll go ahead and see if I can find an exit.
en.cutscene_old_mine_room_4_e_06: Don't forget to take the deep salt with you. I can't wait to see where we end up!
en.cutscene_old_mine_tabascos_plan_01: You've come a bit too far for my liking...
en.cutscene_old_mine_tabascos_plan_02: But here's where your journey will come to an end, I'll make sure of it. Huhuhu.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_01: That was close... *gasp* *gasp*...  Are you okay, Nia?
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_02: I'm fine, but we almost ended up as mush *gasp*.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_03: I hope *gasp*... it's all worth it.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_04: It's already pretty dark. But... I know the area here from my work as an island guide, it's safe.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_05: We should spend the night here.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_06: Hmm... I get what you're saying, but I don't have a sleeping bag with me.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_07: Neither do I! But this time of year, it's still quite warm here at night
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_08: and we can stoke a fire.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_09: Hey Avocado... can I ask you something?
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_11: Don't you ever get bored of the island? I mean, you've been living here forever.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_12: Sometimes, but honestly, I love it here.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_13: As the island guide, I know everyone, and many of the residents are like my second family.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_14: But don't you have the desire to see something new? Something different?
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_16: I dream of going to the mainland, and maybe studying math or physics, or even architecture...
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_17: then I could plan houses and things for people here on the island.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_18: I miss the city. The concerts, the people...
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_19: You guys are only here for a short while!
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_20: There's so much going on on Seashell Island, time'll fly by for you.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_22: Nia, thank you so much for saving me in the mine.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_23: Without you, it would've probably been over for me...
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_24: Oh, it was no big deal.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_25: You got the Deep Salt and saved me.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_26: I think you should enter the cooking competition, you deserve it.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_27: Thank you, Avocado, I'll do my best.
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_29: Haha, I'd never play around with something like that. No really, I'll give it my all,
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_30: and with Master Pankeki's training, it should be a piece of cake!
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_31: [shake]HEY![/shake] Get up sleepyhead! It's already 9 o'clock!
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_32: Urg..b-but I still have to protect the condors at the fort!
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_33: ...what the Barlu are you talking about?
en.cutscene_after_old_mine_35: It's late, so I've gotta head out to do stuff, I'll meet you at [c_highlight_text]Master Pankeki's.[/c]
en.cutscene_pankeki_when_you_have_the_salt_: Avocado already told me everything, so you're going to participate in the cooking tournament.
Yes, yes, I have the weird salt, so now our training can begin!
Hoho, you don't need training anymore, Nia! You've already learned everything you need to know.
Errm, excuse me! We're risking our lives for this salt and you won't teach us???
It was harder to get that salt than to solve last math exam in my finals!
Relax. You'll see, at the cooking tournament you'll discover that you've already learned everything important.
I have trained many cooks in my life, and I know when someone's ready.
Here, Nia, take the invitation to the cooking tournament and go to the lighthouse.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_short_hint_from_riva: I don't think you'll get far here by asking if they'll let you through nicely.
You'll have to be really brazen, and just push them aside.
But no one can be that brazen... it's rude!
Yes, and I'd, uhm, certainly never be that brazen.
en.cutscene_maid_before_cook_off_01: So you want to participate in Mr. Presuntos Grand Cook-Off? Could I see your [c_highlight_text]Invitation[/c] [s_inline_invitation], please?
en.cutscene_maid_before_cook_off_02: Okay, this is a real invitation! You have no idea how many show up here with fake invitations.
en.cutscene_maid_before_cook_off_04: You choose a recipe and must prepare it as quickly as possible.
en.cutscene_maid_before_cook_off_05: Place each part of the dish that's ready on the presentation plate.
en.cutscene_maid_before_cook_off_06: When your dish is finished, press the bell next to the presentation plate as quickly as you can.
en.cutscene_maid_before_cook_off_07: It's actually quite simple when you think about it!
en.cutscene_maid_before_cook_off_08: Oh yes, and you can display the recipe again at any time by pressing
en.cutscene_maid_before_cook_off_09: Don't worry if you don't get it right the first time, you have unlimited tries.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_cook_off_failed_02: I've got to try again, this time it'll work for sure!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_cook_off_reward_00: I will now taste the last dish of the day!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_cook_off_reward_01: Oh fantastic... what a wonderful tasty treat!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_cook_off_reward_02: And now, I shall announce the winner!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_cook_off_reward_03: The most points for taste, speed and appearance, go to...
en.cutscene_lighthouse_cook_off_reward_04: NIA, the student of the legendary Master Pankeki!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_cook_off_reward_06: Here's your trophy! You earned it!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_cook_off_reward_07: And here, take this as a refresher!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_cook_off_reward_08: I think I speak for everybody gathered here when I say that you can cook here again anytime.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_before_boss_01: Fried Tamanegi! You're to blame for this mess!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_before_boss_02: Do you have any idea where we are?
en.cutscene_lighthouse_after_boss_01: Phew, what a relief, you're alright!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_after_boss_02: I'm fine, but you might wanna consider getting a smaller garbage monster or a thicker floor!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_after_boss_03: Yes, uh... you're putting me a bit on the spot there... I'll take care of it.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_after_boss_04: Anyway, Nia, I wish you the best of luck on your journey.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_after_boss_05: You're always welcome to cook with us again!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_photographer_01: You must be Nia!? I'm Peter from Island Daily.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_photographer_02: May I take a winning photo of you for the next issue?
en.cutscene_lighthouse_photographer_04: Unfortunately, I've only got room for one more photo on the film.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_photographer_05: So do not under any circumstances make faces by using
en.cutscene_lighthouse_photographer_06: I repeat, do not under any circumstances use
en.cutscene_lighthouse_photographer_08: That's it, thank you. I'm going to head back to Koala Village now.
en.cutscene_lighthouse_photographer_09: Be sure to check out the next edition!
en.cutscene_lighthouse_photographer_12: But for now, let's go back to [c_highlight_text]Koala Village[/c] and find out what's coming up next.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_no_return: I'm almost there, I can't go back now...
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_02: I found you faceplanted into the ground, right in the middle of the snowstorm.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_05: Of course. I couldn't just leave you there. The snow would've buried you.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_07: Sit closer to the fire. It'll take a while to warm you up properly.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_08: ...I almost made it to Iglu Heights, y'know?
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_09: Hmph! 'Almost' doesn't count if you turn into a snowman on the way.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_10: Ahem! Yeah, well, one day, I'll explore this mountain.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_11: I bet there's tons of secrets hidden up here!
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_12: Erm... good luck with that, I guess. Just... try not to freeze to death while you're at it next time.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_13: I'd never try walking up the mountain at this time of year,
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_14: the snow makes it way too dangerous with how it changes up the paths.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_15: But we don't have a choice.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_16: Do you think we'll actually find all the gears?
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_17: Don't worry, Avo. We'll make it. We have to!
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_19: even if we do, will the island really stabilise after we give the gears to Karasu?
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_20: Or is it just delaying the inevitable?
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_21: I understand how you feel. But we've got to tackle one problem at a time.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_22: First, we stop the island from sinking. Then, we figure out what's next.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_24: No point worrying about things we can't know yet.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_25: By the way... Thanks for saving me.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_26: Don't mention it. You'd have done the same for me, right?
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_27: Of course. I'd never leave anyone behind.
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_28: The storm's letting up. Can you get up by yourself?
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_29: I think so. Let's get moving!
en.cutscene_snow_mountain_field_ice_cave_30: Hang on. Stay behind me. I'll check if the path's safe first.
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_inn_01: Welcome to the Igloo Heights Inn!
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_inn_02: We're the only hotel in the village. Would you like to spend the night with us?
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_inn_03: It looks pretty cozy here... and warm! How much for a night's stay?
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_inn_04_b: Since you saved the village, you can sleep in the VIP room for free!
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_inn_not_enough_ca: Oh, it seems like you don't have enough money on you...
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_inn_stop_player_0: Sorry, madam. That room is for our special guests only.
But I assure you, our standard room is quite comfortable.
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_talk_to_start_dun: Oh, sorry little one! Wait, what!? You were a rice cooker a second ago.
I'm not little, I'm an Icebeak! You've never heard of us?
...Icebeaks are rice cookers that can transform into penguins?
Of course not! We can transform into objects,
but as soon as someone touches us, we transform back to our normal form.
This island's full of surprises! But why'd you decide to transform, and why's the village so empty?
Those pirates appeared recently, and they've been terrorizing the entire village.
That's why everyone transformed into objects and is hiding.
Pirates?! What do they want from such cute little penguins?
Anyway, their leader's [shake]CRAZY[/shake] about breakfast cereal, and we produce the best cereal around.
Now, those miserable scoundrels have occupied our factory, and captured our mayor.
I see. Err, I'd like to help you, but I'm looking for something very important.
Do you happen to have a strange-looking gear here in Igloo Heights?
Hmm, I don't know anything about that. But if anyone knows, it's our mayor.
I'm sure he'll help you as soon as he's been [c_highlight_text]freed from the factory [/c].
Okay, I guess I'll have to go to the factory and save the mayor then.
The factory's over to the [c_highlight_text]east[c] from here. Good luck!
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_asking_for_frozen: My sincerest apologies, but I'm afraid I can't sell you any milk at this time.
It's frozen solid, and selling it in such a state would be against my principles as a shopkeeper!
And let me guess, there's nothing that can be done?
Oh, indeed there is! Simply fetch me some [c_highlight_text]warm water[/c], and all shall be well.
Here, take the key to Snowy's house. I'm quite certain he can help you.
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_snowys_house_intr: Ugh, those stupid pirates really did a number on my cozy igloo...
It's definitely getting kinda frosty in here... I guess...
By the way, Mr. Shopkeeper mentioned you might lend me a hand with getting some hot water.
Yeah, you'll need a [c_highlight_text]Thermos[/c] to keep it warm.
You could ask Glacier for his, but good luck reaching his place without a Shovel.
Here's the deal: Help me patch up my igloo with the shovel, and it's yours to keep.
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_snowys_house_try_: Hey, wait a sec! You've got to fix my igloo before I'll let you leave with my shovel!
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_snowys_house_puzz: Incredible! You did it! Alright, now let's talk about our deal.
So, as I mentioned, you can get [c_highlight_text]the Thermos from Glacier.[/c]
His house is located [c_highlight_text]northwest of Igloo Heights[/c].
Keep the shovel, you'll need it along the way. Well then, good luck with your hot water!
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_glacier_meeting_0: Hey, who are you? Hopefully not a pirate!
Don't worry, I'm not a pirate.
Snowy told me you could lend me your thermos flask.
Oh, that old thing. Yes, you can have it.
There's just one small problem, I forgot it while picknicking... last summer.
Yep, I can see how that could be a problem.
I can describe to you where it was, but you'll probably need a shovel or something to dig it up.
Look for the [c_highlight_text]snowman in the village with a branch on its head,[/c]
follow its gaze until you reach a wall, and dig there.
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_glacier_meeting_1: Wow, that's quite an... odd set of directions.
Yeah, I'm sorry. I remember all the locations using snowmen.
en.cutscene_igloo_heights_after_guard_trick: No way I'd give a fuzz if some penguin sneaks into that factory.
Hey Avocado, the coast is clear!
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_01: Hey, you there! You scallywags aren't part of my crew, are you?
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_02: Why the devil are you barging into my cereal parade?
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_03: I'm here to free the mayor!
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_04: The old coot? Well, congratulations! You hit the jackpot
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_05: because he's the only one who knows how to keep this factory running!
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_06: I'm Kokumaru, the captain of the mighty Cereal Raiders,
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_07: and I won't let any land lubber snatch my cereals!
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_08: I don't care about your flakes! The island's sinking, and I need him to save it.
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_09: Ha! An island doesn't just sink, sweetheart.
en.cutscene_factory_boss_intro_10: But if you really want him, you'll have to get through me first.
en.cutscene_factory_boss_outro_01: Ouch, stop, hold on! I've had enough! Man, you're pretty strong for a teenager!
en.cutscene_factory_boss_outro_02: Seriously, just release the mayor already so I can get on with it.
en.cutscene_factory_boss_outro_03: You'll never find him, my crew hid him well!
en.cutscene_factory_boss_outro_04: Hey Nia, I found the mayor, and he's got the gear with him!
en.cutscene_factory_happy_end_01: Hiring the pirates turned out to be a great idea.
en.cutscene_factory_happy_end_02: Exactly, we're killing two birds with one stone.
en.cutscene_factory_happy_end_03: The pirates are helping us load and distribute the cereals now, and in return,
en.cutscene_factory_happy_end_04: they get as much breakfast cereal as they can eat.
en.cutscene_factory_happy_end_05: Oh, and before I forget, here, Nia and Avocado, the gear. You truly deserve it.
en.cutscene_factory_happy_end_06: And take this as a refreshment.
en.cutscene_factory_happy_end_08: No, I must thank you. Good luck with saving the island!
en.cutscene_factory_happy_end_09: We'll do our best. I'll come visit you again soon!
en.cutscene_factory_happy_end_10: Hey Nia, good work, lets go back to Koala Village!
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_01: We have the gears, can you stop the island from sinking now?
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_02: Oh, I shall stop the island alright... but you won't be around to see it.
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_03: What do you mean by that?
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_04: You were very useful to me.
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_05: I could never have obtained the gears without you. The spell of those four old fools was too strong.
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_07: Lied? No. The island is sinking, and the gears can stop it...
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_08: but this island is much more than just an ark for the last thousand survivors of the Volarian.
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_09: It is a powerful weapon that once wiped out an entire race.
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_10: With the gears, we Volarian can finally reclaim our place at the pinnacle of creation!
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_11: And what will happen to us humans?
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_13: If that's what you're gonna do, then we'll never let you have the gears!
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_14: Heh, heh. We'll see about that!
en.cuntscene_giving_the_gears_17: Let's find that guy and stop him! He must have taken this path.
en.cutscene_final_fight_intro_01: So, you're still alive... surprising. However, this time, you won't be so lucky.
en.cutscene_final_fight_intro_02: You'll pay for this! You dumb feather face!
en.cutscene_final_fight_phase_1_to_2_01: It seems I've underestimated you. No matter. This is your end! Prepare to die!
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_01: You did it, Nia! You defeated that old farty feather face!
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_02: Ugh, yeah, I've no idea how, but somehow we managed.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_04: Humans, you fought well. We thank you.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_05: Without you, we could not have stopped Chancellor Karasu.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_06: You must know that Karasu was once elected by our people as Chancellor
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_07: during a time of decline in our culture.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_08: With seductive promises, he poisoned the hearts of our people.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_09: But once he seized power, he unleashed a war against a rival race, the Maa-Es.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_10: It was a devastating genocide, and the Maa-Es were completely exterminated.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_12: Almost all Volarians fell victim to this madness,
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_13: except for the few who still live on this island or sleep beneath it.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_14: It was the power of this island that destroyed everything.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_15: We stole the gears to prevent another catastrophe.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_16: That damned old raven tricked us...
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_17: He was a master of deception.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_18: Now that the danger is averted, we can finally find our peace.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_19: We shall send you back to the surface. Thank you for everything!
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_20: Wait, hold on! I still have questions for you! What'll happen to this place?
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_21: Yeah! No one should gain access to the terrible knowledge that's down here!
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_22: We will seal this place with the last of our strength.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_23: What about your kin who're still in deep sleep?
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_24: Their time to awaken has not yet come.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_25: One day, they will live in harmony with humans.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_26: You must now leave this place.
en.cutscene_final_volarian_thiefs_27: May the wind carry you far!
en.cutscene_final_town_01: At the end of the Wild Season, an epic festival took place in the heart of the village.
en.cutscene_final_town_02: Everyone came together to celebrate the fact that Arashi had been appeased.
en.cutscene_final_town_03: Only a select few knew of the averted danger, and the sleeping Volarian deep beneath the village...
en.cutscene_final_town_04: This island... it's a strange place with its peculiar inhabitants.
en.cutscene_final_town_05: I think I'll miss it. Avocado said she'd come to visit me, and I could visit her anytime as well.
en.cutscene_final_town_06: I know that this isn't the end of our story, but just another chapter.
en.cutscene_final_town_07: Whatever the future may bring, I'll face it with a broad smile.
en.cutscene_lucca_and_goghs_discord_talking: Psst, I'm planning something, maybe you could, errm, help me?
en.cutscene_graveyard_ghost_giving_rekorder: Oh, uh... and you're that guy who's been haunting this place for a hundred years, I guess?
How do you know my name?
Well, when you're stuck here for so long, you end up overhearing the villagers now and then.
Say, do you happen to know how this thing works?
Looks like a cassette recorder to me. I didn't think ghosts listened to music!
Well, it keeps playing the same melody nonstop,
and honestly, I haven't the faintest clue how to work it. You know what?
I'll put it in your room.
Oh, how generous of you... thank you!
Yes, very generous indeed! (Now you'll have to deal with the endless tunes!)
en.cutscene_lucca_and_goghs_discord_talking: My dad, Lucca, and his brother, Gogh, are constantly arguing and they hardly talk to each other now...
I want to help them reconcile and plan a picnic at [c_highlight_text] shelly beach [/c].
If I do it, they'll definitely smell a rat.
Okay, I'll do it. In the name of family peace, right?
Oh, thank you so much! That means a lot to me. I'm sure it'll work!
Well, let's see if my invitation skills can work some family miracles.
Please invite my Father and Gogh while I prepare the picnic [c_highlight_text] at Shelly Beach! [/c]
en.cutscene_lucca_and_goghs_discord_invitat: Oh, hello. I'm currently painting a landscape. What's up?
I've been asked to invite you on Brina's behalf to a picnic [c_highlight_text] at Shelly Beach [/c].
Oh, from my lovely niece. I'd love to come!
I just hope Lucca won't be there as well. We don't... get along particularly well.
Shelly Beach isn't that far from here, it's located [c_highlight_text] south of Koala Village. [/c]
Hey, Nia, right? I'm pretty busy here.
Still have to work on the engine, and after that, I get to clean up after my careless brother again. Joy, huh?
He leaves his stuff lying around everywhere...
I've been asked to invite you on Brina's behalf to a picnic [c_highlight_text] at Shelly Beach [/c].
Hmm, well, alright. I'm already a bit hungry anyway.
I can probably squeeze in a little picnic before I get back to work.
Shelly Beach isn't that far from here, it's located [c_highlight_text] south of Koala Village. [/c]
en.cutscene_lucca_and_goghs_discord_beach_w: Oh man, there's so many monsters here! How are we supposed to have a picnic with all this around!?
So, that should be the last of them.
en.cutscene_lucca_and_goghs_discord_beach_0: Okay, everything's ready. The two of them should be showing up here any moment now.
Oh, hello dad, there you are.
You! Here! What do you want?
I was invited here for a picnic.
So, you've generously graced us your precious spare time, abandoning those thrilling splashes of paint.
And while you were gracing us with your presence,
did you happen to think about cleaning up the mess you left on my lawn, AGAIN?
Oh, come on, you're blowing this out of proportion. I'll get around to clearing it up later.
en.cutscene_lucca_and_goghs_discord_beach_1: Can't you two finally stop arguing and make up like you used to?
This is your fault! I'll follow her, stay out of it!
I wonder where Brina went. That direction leads to [c_highlight_text] the Barlu Forest. [/c]
Brina used to love playing by the [c_highlight_text] Fairy Pond [/c] there when she was a child. Maybe that's where she is.
At this time of the year, it can get quite dangerous.
It's a bit awkward for me to ask, but Nia,
could you help find Brina before anything happens to her?
You gotcha! I'll follow her trail!
en.cutscene_lucca_and_goghs_discord_nia_fin: Seems like this note book belongs to Brina, she must be close by.
en.cutscene_lucca_and_goghs_discord_forest_: Oh darn! I need to do something!
en.cutscene_lucca_and_goghs_discord_boss_be: Man, am I glad you're doing well Brina!
BRINA!
Thank God you're alive! Are you alright?
I'm fine, dad. Gogh and Nia saved me from a frog monster.
But, Brina, sweetheart, are you sure you're okay?
Yes, dad, really. I'm just a bit shaken, but I'm fine.
Thank you, Nia!
No problem! But I couldn't have done it without Gogh's help.
I told you to stay out of it!
But I'm glad you didn't.
Gogh... I... Thank you! I was angry with you so often, and I wasn't always fair to you.
I'm so sorry!
Lucca, you're my brother. I've always looked up to you.
It's okay, I forgive you. Let's go back to Koala Village.
No, it's not okay.
I was always so angry at you because you didn't seem to care about the family.
But now, I was the one who jeopardized our family.
I'll always help you and the family, no matter what!
Let's go back.
Nia, take this. I found it on my way here. Maybe you'll find some use for it.
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_01: Papa! There's a human in our treehouse!?
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_02: Oh, the human... um, that's a friend of mine.
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_03: Don't worry, you don't have to be afraid!
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_05: I'm Nia. And what's your name?
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_07: Human, please, don't harm me and my children!
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_08: Don't worry, I won't do anything to you. But, you have been stealing stuff from the village, haven't you?
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_10: Some time ago, rocks fell on our storeroom, and we couldn't reach the food there anymore.
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_11: So, I sneak around to grab something for my kids to eat from time to time.
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_13: I've never stolen valuables, only food.
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_14: And I only take a little, never everything.
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_15: Maybe I should check out what's going on with the rocks!
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_16: You'd do that? That'd help so much! Just go one room further up!
en.cutscene_town_thiefs_home_after_stones_0: Wow, you've destroyed all the rocks!
Now we can make it through until new seeds grow!
Thank you from the bottom of my heart, dear Nia.
No problem, it was fun to help.
It's not much, but feel free to take the contents of the chest as a thank you.
en.cutscene_haunted_chicken_coop_intro_01: Cluck cluck... hey, human! Do you want the key to the cursed chicken coop?
en.cutscene_haunted_chicken_coop_intro_02: Then you've got to solve our puzzles here!
en.cutscene_haunted_chicken_coop_intro_03: ...Why would chickens build puzzles in a well?
en.cutscene_haunted_chicken_coop_intro_05: When you've been a ghost for a few decades, you get darn bored.
en.cutscene_haunted_chicken_coop_intro_07: We even tried selling hotdogs once, but as a ghost, you're not exactly a magnet for customers.
en.cutscene_haunted_chicken_coop_intro_08: I see. Well then, I'll get started. I hope it's worth the effort.
en.cutscene_cat_god_beach_clean_up_quest_01: Hey, it's me, the God of Cats, Nekogami.
en.cutscene_cat_god_beach_clean_up_quest_02: I work as the God of Nature on the side, too.
en.cutscene_cat_god_beach_clean_up_quest_03: Pretty nice of you to clean up the beach here.
en.cutscene_cat_god_beach_clean_up_quest_04: ...Um, here's something I happened to have as a reward for you.
en.cutscene_cat_god_beach_clean_up_quest_05: Oh, and be kind to animals, alright!
en.cutscene_trail_in_the_forest_01: Hey, be careful! Don't attack! I'm a pacifist!
en.cutscene_trail_in_the_forest_02: No worries, little one! You seem like you're looking for something?
en.cutscene_trail_in_the_forest_03: Yes, I am. A few ruffians passed by and stole my leek!
en.cutscene_trail_in_the_forest_04: I don't know if you're aware, but leeks are really important to us Tamanegi.
en.cutscene_trail_in_the_forest_05: Have you happened to see two inflated fish-like guys?
en.cutscene_trail_in_the_forest_07: They broke branches and tore off leaves everywhere. I'm currently tracking their trail.
en.cutscene_trail_in_the_forest_08: I'll let you know if I see anything suspicious.
en.cutscene_trail_in_the_forest_moraine_gan: Hehe, we sure showed that blockhead.
That was easier than stealing sardines from a child!
But, Sylvia, what do we do with a leek now?
Hey, short stuff, you've got no business here. Beat it!
Or what? You wanna to teach us a lesson?
Hahaha! Do you even know who we are?
We're Seth and Sylvia from the Moray Gang!
Yeah yeah, Moray, Schmoray, are you done yet!?
You might have defeated us this time, but we'll be back!
You're in for a surprise next time!
Ahhh, thank you so much, human. I'll never forget this.
Wait a moment, I can give you this, I found it along the way!
Thank you and take care, little one! ...And be a bit more careful with your leek in the future!
en.cutscene_moraine_gang_hideout_01: We should come up with a cool catchphrase, so everyone knows it's us!
en.cutscene_moraine_gang_hideout_02: How about 'Born from the deep, our secrets we keep,
en.cutscene_moraine_gang_hideout_03: ruling this terrain, the invincible Octo Reign!'
en.cutscene_moraine_gang_hideout_05: Hey you, what're you doing here?
en.cutscene_moraine_gang_hideout_06: And how long have you been eavesdropping on us?
en.cutscene_moraine_gang_hideout_07: I think it's time for a beatdown!
en.cutscene_moraine_gang_hideout_after_batt: Yeah, we're only backing off for today because we have, uh... a dentist appointment, yeah!
en.cutscene_moraine_gange_ice_skating_befor: It was a really stupid idea of yours to go ice skating.
I can't help it if you're so clumsy!
Clumsy!? I don't know anyone who possesses more elegance than I do!
Did you scare off the mountaineer?
The guy with the helmet? He was bothering us while we were ice skating!
Just like you're doing now, so there'll be consequences.
One shouldn't mess with the mighty Moray Gang!
Little girl, get lost, you're not getting through here.
Yeah, or there'll be a massive beating!
Oh, we'll see about that and who's getting a beating!
en.cutscene_moraine_gange_ice_skating_after: Phew, um, uh, I just remembered, these skates are only borrowed,
and I really need to return them, or else I'll have to pay a fine.
Uh, yeah, exactly! Quickly, let's return them.
You're really lucky we have to do this, otherwise we would've taught you a lesson for real...
Thanks for chasing away those bullies.
Oh, by the way, I found this.
No idea what it is, but maybe you can make something of it.
Now I can continue my journey to Igloo Heights. See you later then!
en.cutscene_village_blackout_start_01: Something's off here... oh, hey. I'm checking the power lines.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_start_02: Some villagers have been griping about power outages. Have you noticed anything?
en.cutscene_village_blackout_start_03: No, I haven't. What's the problem?
en.cutscene_village_blackout_start_04: Probably a break in the line from the solar plant to the village.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_start_05: I need to track it down.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_start_06: If you come across anything, let me know.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_start_07: Got it, boss. I'll keep my eyes peeled.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_in_desert_01: So this is the spot you found. Well, thanks for that.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_in_desert_02: Hmm, looks like I can't do much at the moment.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_in_desert_03: The wires are made out of gold, and I'd have to order that from the mainland.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_in_desert_04: It'll take about three months or so to get here...
en.cutscene_village_blackout_in_desert_05: If you had gold, could you make the wires?
en.cutscene_village_blackout_in_desert_06: Yeah, that'd work. But you'll only find gold over in Bran Bran Peak's caves.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_in_desert_07: It's pretty dangerous this time of year.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_in_desert_08: If I happen to come across any gold, I'll bring it to you.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_with_gold_01: Did you find the gold on Bran Bran Peak?
en.cutscene_village_blackout_with_gold_02: Let me take a look... hmm, alright, this will do.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_with_gold_04: Okay, everything should be working now. I can finally head home.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_with_gold_05: Thanks for the help, even if it's been a bit of a hassle.
en.cutscene_village_blackout_with_gold_06: Here, this is what's left over.
en.cutscene_finding_sleeping_moh_01: Hey, kid! Wake up, it's not safe to sleep here!
en.cutscene_finding_sleeping_moh_02: ...yawn... oh, uhm, where am I? How'd I end up here?
en.cutscene_finding_sleeping_moh_03: Well, never mind, I'll make my way home. Thanks, Lady, for waking me up.
en.cutscene_finding_sleeping_moh_04: I found this, maybe you can use it.
en.cutscene_finding_sleeping_moh_05: Thanks, that's useful. Have a safe trip home!
en.cutscene_finding_sleeping_moh_bomb_bag: You received an extension for the Bomb Bag. You can now carry 5 more Bombs!
en.cutscene_finding_sleeping_moh_animl_food: You received an extension for the Wonder Treats Bag. You can now carry 10 more Animal Food!
en.obj_cereal_factory_picross_tutorial_00: Use the shovel, and dig at the marked cross to activate the puzzle.
en.obj_cereal_factory_picross_tutorial_01: The numbers indicate the number of connected holes in each row or column.
en.obj_cereal_factory_picross_tutorial_02: Use the shovel, and dig only in those spots to solve the puzzle.
en.obj_cereal_factory_telepot_hint_01: If you get stuck, use the Telepot to start from the beginning.
en.obj_closed_small_key_door: It's locked... seems like you need a key for it.
en.obj_closed_boss_key_door: You need some sort of special key here.
en.obj_dungeon_glasshouse_phone_01: Hey man! People say that there's a weird wall in the big room.
en.obj_dungeon_glasshouse_phone_02: Maybe a bomb could destroy it?
en.obj_dungeon_water_facility_treasure_hunt: I've got no idea what kind of ruin this is, but I bet there's lots of treasures down here...
Unfortunately, I haven't found anything yet. Maybe there's a wall somewhere that can be blown up.
I should be careful not to attract the attention of old Barlu.
Note to self: the creature further down the hall looks pretty hungry!
If only I had a hockey stick or something like that, I could toss it something to eat...
en.obj_farm_catring_note_01: To all treasure hunters! Here's a riddle for you:
en.obj_farm_catring_note_02: I love playing here on the farm.
en.obj_farm_catring_note_03: Cats are my best friends, and I built them a secret hideout.
en.obj_farm_catring_note_04: That's also where I hid my most valuable treasure!
en.obj_final_dungeon_sign_level_01_01: May destruction and despair haunt all who oppose the Volarian.
en.obj_final_dungeon_password_page_hint_01: I have hid a page of the password book in the safe here.
en.obj_final_dungeon_password_page_hint_02: This will make sure no one can enter any deeper level of the facility.
en.obj_final_dungeon_password_page_found_01: A page from a book, ripped out. It's about some symbols or something.
en.obj_final_dungeon_password_page_found_02: It might come in handy later, so I'll store it in my mind for now.
en.obj_final_dungeon_room_10_puzzle_help_01: Most of the Pages aren't readable anymore, but there's a note from someone:
en.obj_final_dungeon_room_10_puzzle_help_02: Heat seems to be the solution.
en.obj_forest_04_tunnel_sign_01: It seems that the Barlu trees in our sector are growing a little slower than planned.
en.obj_forest_04_tunnel_sign_02: Because of this, the administration has approved usage of the new fertilizer.
en.obj_forest_04_tunnel_sign_03: Please be careful when using it, just a little too much and we can forget about harvesting for years.
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_notes_01: Note to employees: the large tank blocks are partially out of sync.
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_notes_02: Maintenance has been informed about the situation.
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_notes_03: However, given current affairs, it is impossible to estimate when someone will come to fix it.
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_notes_04: One of the switches can be hit with something to shoot or throw, in order to get through easily.
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_notes_05: Otherwise, there is currently no way to reach the back of the plant.
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_02_notes_01: The production of slumber resin has decreased by 12% in the first quarter.
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_02_notes_02: Unfortunately, we've kept having outages due to bugs on the plants.
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_02_notes_03: I've gone back over the tables in detail and I'm expecting
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_02_notes_04: a 7% drop in the production of the hypersleep drops.
en.obj_forest_05_sleep_chamber_02_notes_05: We need to inform the leadership about this immediately.
en.obj_inside_mountain_low_weight_puzzle_hi: All weights must be placed on the scale.
en.obj_inside_mountain_main_colling_system_: 6000 years a.t.D.: The cooling system for the weapon systems and the drive are still in good condition,
and some minor maintenance has been performed.
9000 years a.t.D..: The cooling system is still functional, but some major maintenance has to be done
to keep the weapon systems operational. It seems like intelligent life forms have settled
on the island. However, they do not seem to have discovered this facility.
10000 years a.t.D.: By order of Grand Chancellor Karasu, the cooling system has been brought to
Weapon systems are ready for use.
en.obj_library_books_I_1: The Book's called The Adventurer's Bible I:
en.obj_library_books_I_2: Lesson 1: "Be curious". Find coins and other items by destroying bushes, enemies or other things.
en.obj_library_books_I_3: Use your Coins wisely in one of the many local shops.
en.obj_library_books_II_1: The Book's called The Adventurer's Bible II.
en.obj_library_books_II_2: Lesson 2: "Assert yourself". Everyone knows how it goes, you walk through the countryside and find a
en.obj_library_books_II_3: crumbling stone wall. Just try out [c_highlight_text]a bomb[/c] and see what's behind it!
en.obj_library_books_II_4: Professional Tip: sometimes you can blow up even the common looking walls!
en.obj_library_books_III_1: The Book's called The Adventurer's Bible III.
en.obj_library_books_III_2: Today, we want to tell our readers about the pause menu.
en.obj_library_books_III_3: As soon as you find an interesting Item, check it out by pressing
en.obj_library_books_III_4: Some items you can equip to your [c_highlight_text]Action Buttons[/c] by simply selecting the Item and pressing the Button.
en.obj_library_books_IV_1: The Book's called The Adventurer's Bible IV.
en.obj_library_books_IV_2: Lesson 4: "Communication". Every good adventurer should talk frequently with local residents.
en.obj_library_books_IV_3: Check in more often, and see if someone can tell you anything new.
en.obj_lemon_trophy_swords: The swords look very old and valuable.
en.obj_letterbox_bettys_house: It reads "Here lives Betty". The Letterbox looks like it's been bumped around a bit...
en.obj_master_chef_stew_heal: The taste's simply incredible! I feel like all my power's back again.
en.obj_moraine_gange_hidden_switch: There's a hidden switch here. Do you want to push it?
en.obj_ninja_house_books_a: The Great Ninja Handbook, Bushido for Dummies and How to Become a Successful Shinobi.
en.obj_ninja_house_books_b: There's a note here: do not run into the hiding wall! ...I wonder what that means?
en.obj_ninja_house_katana: There's a little label on the swords... it says replica.
en.obj_ninja_house_wall_scroll: A scroll with a letter on it. Unfortunately, I have no idea what it means.
en.obj_ninja_house_book_stack: Opening the book, it seems to be called "100 Tips for Hiding from Strangers - Shinobi Edition".
en.obj_ninja_house_training_tool: Looks like a kind of training tool?
en.obj_rehearsal_room_papers: Sheet music with the songs: "Grown to be Wild", "Another Eggplant in the Wall", "All you need is Leek"
en.obj_save_point: Do you want to save your progress?
en.obj_swamp_puzzle_help_stone: The door shall open for the one who brings the 3 animals back to their safe paddock...
en.obj_signpost_001: [s_ui_inline_arrow_up] Koala Village  [s_ui_inline_arrow_right] Farm  /n[s_ui_inline_arrow_down] Shelly Beach   [s_ui_inline_arrow_left] Barlu Forest
en.obj_signpost_help_weremoles_02: When you spot them digging beneath your feet,
en.obj_signpost_help_weremoles_03: remember to feed them with explosive surprises, bombs are their weakness!
en.obj_signpost_unstable_ground: The floor here's extremely unstable, be careful to NEVER have too much weight on one spot!
en.obj_signpost_muscle_dude_01: Here lives the bodybuilder, M. Uscle. /n I train anyone who brings me Heartcoins.
en.obj_signpost_town_shrine_02: In the Wild Season, Seashell Island is surrounded by storms that make the island inaccessible.
en.obj_signpost_town_shrine_03: During this time, the most beautiful shells are placed under the shrine as an offering.
en.obj_signpost_town_shrine_04: If Arashi is appeased, the sea is also appeased.
en.obj_signpost_town_shrine_05: It is said that the statue at the shrine was already standing there, at the time of when the first people came to the island.
en.obj_signpost_greenhouse_ice_room_01: The ice cube machine produces blocks in no time.
en.obj_signpost_greenhouse_ice_room_02: Just leave the room for a moment, and they're back again.
en.obj_signpost_old_mine_room_4_01: Instructions for the salt ore machine:
en.obj_signpost_old_mine_room_4_02: First, you need to load the machine. To do this, throw a salt ore into the hopper.
en.obj_signpost_old_mine_room_4_03: Press the button to start the machine.
en.obj_signpost_old_mine_room_4_04: IMPORTANT! As soon as it steams, press the button again,
en.obj_signpost_old_mine_room_4_05: otherwise you may have to start again from the beginning.
en.obj_signpost_igloo_heights_shop: Bombs & Cereals: We sell everyday articles like bombs, cereals and milk!
en.obj_signpost_hidden_island_01: Natural Phenomenon: A small satellite island of Seashell Island reacts to specific sounds.
en.obj_signpost_hidden_island_02: The appearance of the island seems to depend on the location of the sound.
en.obj_signpost_hidden_island_volarian_01: Instructions for the pump system: a signal tone activates readiness.
en.obj_signpost_hidden_island_volarian_02: The signal should sound exactly in the middle, between the three stone markers.
en.obj_signpost_old_pump_facility_01: Pump system for drainage of the underground spaces in Quadrant C.
en.obj_signpost_old_pump_facility_letter_01: It was advantageous that we subsequently installed the pump system on the island.
en.obj_signpost_old_pump_facility_letter_02: During the ultimate strike, it performed remarkably well,
en.obj_signpost_old_pump_facility_letter_03: allowing us to annihilate the Ganglion.
en.obj_signpost_old_pump_facility_letter_04: By the way, your request for more Barlu wood has been reviewed, and I am pleased to inform you
en.obj_signpost_old_pump_facility_letter_05: that it has been approved from the highest authority. - Chief Administrative Officer Keiv
en.obj_signpost_desert_gondola_help: CAUTION: The red gondolas travel in both directions, but the blue ones only in one!
en.obj_signpost_desert_climb_jump_hint_02: to take a shortcut when climbing down.
en.obj_signpost_lighthouse_front_sign_01: Welcome to Mr. Presunto's Lighthouse, home of the legendary [c_highlight_text]Grand Cook-Off![/c]
en.obj_signpost_lighthouse_front_sign_02: Here, the finest chefs compete in fiery battles for fame, glory, and the title of Master Chef!
en.obj_signpost_lighthouse_garbage_monster_: Welcome to the Trash Monster Floor!
This floor houses our friendly trash monster, who takes care of all the kitchen waste.
Our walls and doors are reinforced to ensure the maximum safety of all our guests.
Please dispose of your kitchen refuse in the designated containers
and let the trash monster do its job.
Thank you for your cooperation and enjoy your stay!
en.obj_signpost_factory_shovel_hint_01: Shovel Tip: the type of ground determines the kind of shovel balls created,
en.obj_signpost_factory_shovel_hint_02: and their unique properties: Earth, Snow, and Sand.
en.obj_signpost_ice_labyrinth_warning_02: Enter the ice maze only with a reliable [c_highlight_text]hot water bottle[/c], or if you're truly tough.
en.obj_signpost_fishing_pond_village: Tip: if you have a Hiku bird, you can use it for fishing.
en.obj_signpost_yokai_forest_warning_01: Warning! This path leads to the Phantom Grove. Enter at your own risk!
en.obj_signpost_yokai_forest_warning_02: If you have an urgent matter to take care of,
en.obj_signpost_yokai_forest_warning_03: be sure to take the ceremonial lamp provided there to protect yourself from the spirits.
en.obj_skg_office_book_shelf_01: There's tonnes of artbooks and video games here...
en.obj_skg_office_book_shelf_02: And also a book titled 'Game Design for Dummies'.
en.obj_skg_office_pin_board_02: One of them says: 'Include the office of Slime King Games as an Easter egg.'
en.obj_teleporter_puzzle_shrine_help_stone: To activate the speed tunnel station, bring the special blocks in line.
en.obj_teleporter_puzzle_shrine_help_stone_: Do you want another hint for:
There's no more hints! Do you want to solve the puzzle for:
en.obj_teleporter_puzzle_solved: Oh, you've already solved this puzzle! Looks like you don't need hints anymore.
en.obj_teleporter_hint_farm_02: The red ones must be solved in a row of four.
en.obj_teleporter_hint_desert_01: Be careful, the red ones can only be solved in a row of five.
en.obj_teleporter_hint_igloo_heights_01: Use the water stone to free the fire stone.
en.obj_teleporter_hint_igloo_heights_02: Move the fire stone clock wise.
en.obj_treasure_hunter_tent_notes_01: Yesterday, I found an ominous [s_inline_gear_02] [c_highlight_text]Gear in the nearby ruins.[/c]
en.obj_treasure_hunter_tent_notes_02: It's made out of a material unknown to me... it seems like it's harder than metal or stone.
en.obj_treasure_hunter_tent_notes_03: It's probably very precious, I'd better keep it with me.
en.obj_treasure_hunter_tent_notes_04: Today I'll venture deeper into the ruins, there must be more treasures there.
en.obj_water_facility_arrow_puzzle_help_sto: An arrow points to the door that will open.
en.obj_water_facility_labyrinth_puzzle_help: Once, the three Wanderers of the Sky came to a crossroads.
The Moon Wanderer, quiet and thoughtful, chose the left path.
The Sun Wanderer, proud and bold, took the right path.
And the Star Wanderer, curious and wise, walked straight ahead.
Only those who understand their choices will find the path that leads to the truth.
Should you falter, return to the beginning.
en.obj_desert_key_avtivator_no_key_01: There's an indentation here... presumably, something's been removed.
en.obj_fishbowl_slot_machine_00: The note says, I should add a fish...
en.obj_fishbowl_slot_machine_thank_you: Thank you! Hit me for your reward!
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_intro_01: A mortal soul dares to disturb my eternal dreaming!
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_intro_02: I am Torogami, revered and feared as a god over aeons.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_intro_03: Child of the Earth, prove to me your wisdom!
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_wrong_answers_01: Come back when you have gained more wisdom!
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_right_answers_01: Enough! You have proven your wisdom to me. Here, take this as a reward!
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_02: The Village at the Island's center is called Monkey Town.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_03: Cereal packages can be collected all over the island.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_04: The police officer can be found in every dungeon.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_05: There are 3 boats at the Island Harbour.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_06: You can purchase herbs to cure poison status.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_07: With 4 Heartcoins, you can obtain a new Life-container.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_08: The Giant Worm in the Forest is named Barlu.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_09: The maritime creature gang is known as the Murray Gang.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_10: The Island has its own Newspaper.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_11: There's a haunted Chicken Coop on the island.
en.obj_quiz_sphinx_question_12: The Koala Store periodically stocks and offers new items.
en.obj_pankeki_closet_01: A magazine titled 'Hot Women, Hot Dishes'...? Too spicy for my tastes!
en.obj_yokai_forest_center_ruins_writing_01: Torogami has answered our prayers, and our enemy has been vanquished.
en.obj_yokai_forest_center_ruins_writing_02: Yet, something eerie lingers in these days.
en.obj_yokai_forest_center_ruins_writing_03: At night, strange sounds pierce the silence.
en.obj_yokai_forest_center_ruins_writing_04: One of the priests even claimed to have seen the spirit of a Maa-Es. Ridiculous!
en.obj_yokai_forest_center_ruins_writing_05: Pure imagination, nothing more. Surely, these noises will soon fade away...
en.obj_yokai_forest_deep_ruins_writing_01: These strange, ghostly creatures are being sighted more and more frequently.
en.obj_yokai_forest_deep_ruins_writing_02: Most of the priests have already abandoned the cathedral.
en.obj_yokai_forest_deep_ruins_writing_03: Is it the curse of the Maa-Es, or Torogami's punishment?
en.obj_yokai_forest_deep_ruins_writing_04: Our warriors are powerless against the spirits. If we cannot find a solution,
en.obj_yokai_forest_deep_ruins_writing_05: we will have no choice but to abandon this sacred place.
en.obj_volarian_library_book_1_01: The new defense system has been tested and appears to be functional.
en.obj_volarian_library_book_1_02: We are now able to unleash storms of unparalleled force around the island,
en.obj_volarian_library_book_1_03: making it impossible to enter or leave.
en.obj_volarian_library_book_1_04: However, one of the engineers remarked that
en.obj_volarian_library_book_1_05: the system may still be prone to errors and requires further refinement.
en.obj_volarian_library_book_2_01: Recently, reports of strange sightings have increased in the southeastern forest of the island.
en.obj_volarian_library_book_2_02: Shadowy figures have been seen there,
en.obj_volarian_library_book_2_03: ghostly apparitions that leave us puzzled.
en.obj_volarian_library_book_2_04: It would be wise to send some of our Shapers to investigate this matter.
en.obj_school_kid_letter_01: They say the cemetery south of Koala Village is haunted at night.
en.obj_school_kid_letter_02: At least, that's what the other kids say.
en.obj_school_kid_letter_03: But my parents say there's no such thing as ghosts,
en.obj_school_kid_letter_04: except maybe chicken ghosts, and those aren't anything to be afraid of.
en.obj_farm_barn_cat_door_01: Hmm, the door's locked... there's an image of a cat on it.
en.achievement_healthy_explorer_desk: Reach the maximum number of life containers
en.achievement_advanced_cartographer_desk: Keep going! Uncover 50% of the map
en.achievement_coconut_golf_desk: Complete Coconut-Golf with just three moves
en.achievement_chicken_pen_desk: Complete the haunted chicken coop minidungeon
en.achievement_morray_gang_hideout_desk: Find a way into the Moray Gangs hideout
en.achievement_beat_the_octos_desk: Give the Moray duo a triple lesson in defeat!
en.achievement_cat_karma_desc: A wise sage once said, 'be nice to animals'
en.achievement_snow_boarding_desc: Finish the Snowboard Minigame in under 2 Minutes
en.achievement_befriend_a_dog_desc: Good boy! Give a dog a treat and make friends
en.achievement_bring_bag_kittens_desc: Cuteness multiplied! Reunite all the kittens with the cat mom
en.achievement_find_bomb_bag_desc: It's time to go boom! Get the bombs from Betty
en.achievement_quiz_sphinx_desc: Unravel the mysteries of Torogami's questions!
en.achievement_first_ramen_bowl_desc: Ramen is life! Buy a bowl of ramen
en.achievement_cassette_tapes_desk: Find all of the hidden music tapes
en.achievement_monster_encyclopaedia_desk: Unlock all the pages of the Monster Encyclopaedia
en.achievement_hobby_cartographer_desc: Every journey starts somewhere! Uncover 25% of the map
en.misc_tutorial_equipment_02: and assign an item to a button with
en.misc_car_driver_01: [shake]What the [s_ui_inline_swear_01] [s_ui_inline_swear_02] [s_ui_inline_swear_03] [s_ui_inline_swear_04] are you doing to my car?![/shake]
en.misc_car_driver_02: [shake]The bill will be in your mailbox next week![/shake]
en.misc_car_driver_03: But I have to admit, you've got talent...
en.misc_car_driver_04: have you ever considered becoming a [shake]professional vandal?[/shake]
en.misc_bar_closed: It's currently closed, I should come back later.
en.misc_house_closed: Looks like there's no one home right now; I'll just try again later.
en.misc_shop_not_enough_cash: Sorry, you haven't got enough cash
en.misc_shop_carry_to_much: You're already carrying too much of it around with you.
en.misc_give_item_to_someone: Do you want to give away this item:
en.misc_heart_got_heart_container_juice: You got a tasty Life Juice! Your maximum hearts increased by one.
en.misc_system_message_confirmation_to_titl: Do you really want to go back to the title screen? Keep in mind that your unsaved progress will be lost.
en.misc_system_message_confirmation_quit_ga: Do you really want to quit the game? Keep in mind that your unsaved progress will be lost.
en.misc_newspaper_wild_season: And again this year, the storms start just in time for summer. The first shells were already offered at the Shrine of Arashi. I wonder if it can appease the wind god? We'll find out in about three months.
en.misc_newspaper_cook_off: We experience a lot here on Seashell Island, but yesterday (06.13.1995) something very unexpected happened... again. At Mr. Presunto's Grand Cook-Off, an unknown newcomer won! The student of the legendary Master Pankeki, they were able to beat two of the world's best competing chefs, and won with an outstanding time.
en.misc_newspaper_big_barlu_header:
Barlu Is On The
Rampage Again
en.misc_newspaper_big_barlu: Barlu Forest - Near the lumberjack camp, the giant worm Big Barlu was seen spitting out two people. ''I've never seen anything like it!',' a lumberjack exclaimed. Why Barlu swallowed them up in the first place, only to spit them out again, remains a mystery.
en.misc_locked_from_other_side: It's locked from the other side.
en.misc_password_puzzle_nia_01: An old Book, show me your Secrets!
en.misc_password_puzzle_01: ONE SYMBOL IS CORRECT AND IN THE CORRECT POSITION.
en.misc_password_puzzle_02: ONE SYMBOL IS CORRECT BUT IT'S POSITION IS INCORRECT.
en.misc_password_puzzle_03: TWO SYMBOLS ARE CORRECT, BUT THEIR POSITIONS ARE INCORRECT.
en.misc_password_puzzle_04: NONE OF THE SYMBOLS ARE CORRECT.
en.misc_igloo_heights_hot_spring: Ah, a hot spring. I'd be down for a bath if I had more time.
en.misc_igloo_heights_hot_spring_with_empty: I guess I can take some hot water from the spring.
So now I've just got to go back to the shop dude
en.misc_want_to_take_a_nap_01: Do you want to take a break?
en.misc_startup_tipp_01: Games are meant to be fun, don't stress it, take your time and enjoy the experience!
en.misc_startup_tipp_02: The best solutions often come after a short break. Step away if you're stuck!
en.misc_startup_tipp_03: Brew yourself a hot cup of tea or coffee. It's the perfect companion for an epic gaming session.
en.misc_startup_tipp_04: Grab a bowl of your favourite cereal for a crunchy boost while you play.
en.misc_startup_tipp_05: Snuggle up with your favorite pillow and make your gaming space extra cozy.
en.misc_startup_tipp_06: Celebrate every victory, no matter how small. Progress is progress!
en.misc_song_and_artist_cave: Monsters and Secrets in the Dark - Robert Kilpatrick
en.misc_song_and_artist_lighthouse: The Most Important Food - Miyoko Takaoka
en.misc_song_and_artist_finalboss2: Bellow of the Wicked Beast - Eddie Marianukroh
en.misc_music_tape_treasure_chest_01: You found a cassette! If you already have a [c_highlight_text]cassette player[/c],
en.misc_music_tape_treasure_chest_02: you can listen to the following tape in Nia's room:
en.misc_startup_tipp_last_chapter_finished_: So, what's happening on this island?
